faqs.question: Which Medical fields offer the best work-life balance?
faqs.answer:
Some medical field which offe best work and life balance are shown below -
Dentistry (BDS & MDS) – Fixed clinic hours, fewer emergencies.
Pharmacy (BPharm & MPharm) – Less stress compared to hospital-based jobs.
Physiotherapy (BPT & MPT) – Flexible working hours, minimal emergency calls.
Public Health & Community Medicine – Focus on preventive healthcare rather than emergency treatments.
Clinical Research & Medical Writing – Research-based work with no direct patient responsibilities.

placements.overview:
Established in 1981, K.M.College of Pharmacy is a private institute in Madurai, Tamil Nadu. The institute is approved by the PCI. At the UG and PG levels, the institute offers 7 courses across 3 specialisations in Full Time mode. The popular K.M.College of Pharmacy programs include B.Pharma, M.Pharma and D.Pharma. K.M.College of Pharmacy courses are provided in several streams including Medicine & Health Sciences, etc. The institute has a total seat intake of 265 students. The fees at K.M.College of Pharmacy ranges between INR 42,000 to 1,12,000 for the different courses. The institute has a well-laid infrastructure with multiple facilities.

K.M.College of Pharmacy offers various programmes at UG and PG levels. Students can choose Full Time courses from stream such as Medicine & Health Sciences. At the UG level, students can choose from courses, namely B.Pharma and D.Pharma. On the other hand, at the PG level, the K.M.College of Pharmacy offers M.Pharma. The fees for K.M.College of Pharmacy courses range between INR 42,000 to 1,12,000.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: K.M.College of Pharmacy offers various programmes at UG and PG levels. Students can choose Full Time courses from stream such as Medicine & Health Sciences. The fees for K.M.College of Pharmacy courses range between INR 42,000 to 1,12,000.

Maharishi Dayanand Saraswati University Ajmer (MDSU) offers UG, PG and PhD courses with diploma in Management, Science, Arts, Commerce and Social Sciences, etc. At the PG level, the MSc and MCom courses offered by Maharshi Dayanand Saraswati University. placements.overview:
The placement details for the Class of 2025 are yet to be released on the official website. The students of MDSU shared their reviews on the Shiksha page. According to a recent review, was placed successfully in reputed companies. The and given during the recent MDSU Ajmer placements stood at INR 15 LPA and INR 8 LPA, respectively. The top recruiters who participated during Maharshi Dayanand Saraswati University placements included Tata, ITC, Infosys, Deloitte, Wipro, ICICI Bank, TCS, etc.

Let’s take a look at the information given for the recent MDSU placements:

student_insights.feedback: Students can work with faculty on research projects
Many students looking for better jobs
Some students found placement process useful, some didn't
Students are expected to reach out to companies themselves
Not very well placed alumni network but very active

faqs.answer: A:    MDSU Ajmer detailed placement report is not released. However, as per students reviews, highest and average package in recent past was around 15 LPA and 4 LPA.
faqs.question: Does MDSU offer good placements?

faqs.answer: A:    As per the official website, various recruiters visited every year at MDSU and placed students in new-age job roles. The top recruiters of who participated during the recent MDSU placements included ITC, Tata Group, Infosys, Tech Mahindra, Wipro, ICICI Bank, TCS, HDFC Bank, etc.
faqs.question: Who are the top recruiters of MDSU?

faqs.question: What is the fees for MDSU Ajmer courses?

faqs.answer: A:    The total tuition fee for M.A. Programme offered by MDSU ranges from INR 700 to INR 62,500. The normal Master of Arts M.A. Programme at Maharshi Dayanand Saraswati University (MDSU) is a two-year programme. The course is full-time and is divided into four semesters. The university offers eight different specialisations for the M.A. The specialisations are Economics, Hindi Journalism and Mass Communication, History, Political Science, Population Studies, Sanskrit Vedic Vangmaya, and Geography. Candidates can submit an online application to be considered for M.A. Admission. MDSU M.A. Admission is solely merit-based. The basic eligibility criteria required to be able to apply for M.A. Programme is that the candidate should have a Bachelor degree with a minimum of 48% aggregate from a recognised institute or university.
faqs.question: What is the fee for the M.A. Programme at MDSU?

faqs.answer: A:    Aspirants who are willing to get admission to the LLB programme at MDSU must qualify for the basic eligibility criteria. As per the criteria, students seeking admission to the LLB course must have passed Class 12 examinations in any stream from a recognised board of India. Students must note that failure to fulfill can lead to rejection during the application stage.
faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for LLB course at MDSU?

faqs.answer: A:    No, candidates are not required to qualify for any entrance exam to pursue MA from MDSU. Admissions to this course is done through a merit scores of the last qualifying exam. Candidates have to submit their academic scorecards and certificate at the time of filling the application form. Based on their past academic records, students will be shortlisted and notified though merit list.

reviews_list.review_title: A good college option for BCA in Bhilwara.

review_content.Placements: Swift College offers decent placement opportunities with regular training sessions interview preparation and guidance from the placement cell. Some reputed companies visit the campus and many students get placed. There is still scope to bring in more diverse recruiters and higher package opportunities. Placements are satisfactory for students who prepare well.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college has pretty good infrastructure. We have a computer lab for projects and research, a fully stocked library with all the study material we need, and even indoor games to relax. The playground is a great spot for sports and activities. Overall, the facilities make college life comfortable and fun.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: It is the best college in Bhilwara. I am totally satisfied with it.

review_content.Placements: Other than students who wanted to go for higher studies, all are placed at good organisations. The highest package offered that year was 24 LPA, and the average package was 4 LPA. We got a chance for internship options as well, with different job profiles.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is good. We almost got everything we need. Facilities like classrooms, library, labs, and everything are provided. We also have an indoor playing area as well as a big field. I think the college has above-average infrastructure. There are no hostel facilities available. Medical facilities, sports and games facilities are also available here.

faqs.answer: As per some unofficial websites, the last date to apply for MDSU admissions is usually in the month of August. Online applications are allowed by Maharshi Dayanand Saraswati University. Candidates must go to the official website, select the Admissions link, register there with the necessary information, pay the application fee by bank challan, complete the application form, submit it, and print it off for their records. Maharshi Dayanand Saraswati University (MDSU) admission is both merit and entrance-based. The university offers a range of UG, PG, doctoral, Diploma, Advanced Diploma, and Certificate courses in Management, Science, Arts, Commerce, and Social Science.
faqs.question: Q: What is the last date for MDSU admission?

faqs.answer: The MDSU Ajmer PhD course is availabl in both full-time and part-time modes at MDSU Ajmer. Under part-time mode, candidates can get admission in two categories which include Part/Full-time employment and Project category. Candidates who are applying for these categories must produce a no objection certificate from their employer to secure PhD admissions at MDSU Ajmer.
faqs.question: Q: Is PhD at MDSU Ajmer available in Full-time or Part-time mode?

faqs.answer: Maharshi Dayanand Saraswati University Ajmer generally only accepts applications online. But, students can contact the university's admission desk to know more. The university or affiliating college may offer the provision of offline application submission.
faqs.question: Q: Can I apply offline for MDSU Ajmer admission?

faqs.answer: Yes, PhD students who are female or recognised under Persons with Disabilities will be offered a two year relaxation for maximum PhD course duration. Unlike the general category which can only have a maximum duration of six years, candidates of the aforementioned categories can have a duration just below 10 years at MDSU Ajmer.
faqs.question: Q: Are PhD students of MDSU Ajmer offered any relaxation of maximum course duration?

course_faqs.question: How much does it cost to study a BSc course at MDSU Ajmer?
course_faqs.answer: At the time of admission, candidates are required to pay a sum amount of fee to confirm their seat. Total course fee includes tuition fee, hostel fee, security deposit, etc. The total tuition fee for BSc courses is INR 13,400 – INR 1.42 lakh. This fee is as per unofficial sources and thus is subject to changes. Candidates can also visit the MDSU website (mdsuajmer.ac.in) for more details.

course_faqs.question: How long is BSc at MDSU Ajmer?
course_faqs.answer: BSc at MDSU Ajmer is three years long. The BSc programme follows the semester model, which means that each year of the programme is divided into two semesters in each year. Therefore, candidates have to pass six semesters of the BSc programme to be eligible for a BSc degree. At the time of admission candidates will have to choose their desired specialisation and the affiliated college that they want to take admission in.

course_faqs.question: What is the fee for MSc at MDSU?
course_faqs.answer: The fee for the MSc programme at MDSU include various charges such as tuition fees, hostel fees, and admission charges. The total tuition fee ranges from around INR 7,500 to INR 1.44 lakh. The fee details are mentioned as per the official website and are indicative.

overview_faqs.question: What is the fee for the M.A. Programme at MDSU?
overview_faqs.answer: The total tuition fee for M.A. Programme offered by MDSU ranges from INR 700 to INR 62,500. The normal Master of Arts M.A. Programme at Maharshi Dayanand Saraswati University (MDSU) is a two-year programme. The course is full-time and is divided into four semesters. The university offers eight different specialisations for the M.A. The specialisations are Economics, Hindi Journalism and Mass Communication, History, Political Science, Population Studies, Sanskrit Vedic Vangmaya, and Geography. Candidates can submit an online application to be considered for M.A. Admission. MDSU M.A. Admission is solely merit-based. The basic eligibility criteria required to be able to apply for M.A. Programme is that the candidate should have a Bachelor degree with a minimum of 48% aggregate from a recognised institute or university.

overview_faqs.question: What is the fee for LLM at MDSU?
overview_faqs.answer: As per the unofficial sources, the tuition fee for LLM course at MDSU is INR 700 for both the years. Other than the tuition fee, candidates also have to pay for Caution Deposit and Library Security Deposit as the one-time fee payment along with the Hostel Charges (if applicable). Students can visit the MDSU website (mdsuajmer.ac.in) for more details on the fee structure.

overview_faqs.question: Is MDSU Ajmer a recognised university?
overview_faqs.answer: Yes, Maharshi Dayanand Saraswati University has received approval and recognition from national bodies such as:The UGC which has recognised MDSU Ajmer as a State Public University. The AICTE which has approved the university and its coursesThe NAAC which has accredited the institute with a B+ grade.

overview_faqs.question: Is LLM available at MDSU?
overview_faqs.answer: Yes, MDSU offers a PG level LLM course for a duation of two years at the Faculty of Law. This course is offered under the Self-Financing (SFS) category. Apart from pursuing the course at the university, students can also study LLM at the MDSU's affiliated colleges. These colleges are Government Law College, Ajmer and Rajeev Gandhi Vidhi Mahavidyalaya. The admission process for LLM courses is same across all colleges. Candidates can visit the official website of the respective colleges to know more about the admisison process.

review_summary.college_name: MDSU Ajmer Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Overall good, needs infrastructure upgradation.

content.Placements: 55% of students in this BBA course are placed. The highest package offered in this course is 3.5 LPA, the lowest package is 1.5 LPA, and the average is 2 LPA. Top recruiting companies are SBI, Satguru, IT startups, etc. 50% of students got internships, and the companies are likely to be from finance, HR, management, and various other relevant sectors. Top roles offered include HR management, finance, accounting, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure in our department are pretty decent, not so good but manageable. There is a library where the best material is available for all the courses, and our department, BBA, is proceeding to open a separate library only for this department, which would be a great add-on. There is a hostel facility available on campus which is pretty decent, with quality food and a separate canteen available. Sports and games fields are available with active engagement.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Arts (B.A.) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Average college with decent faculty members but weak placements.

content.Placements: Only 30-40 percent of students from our batch got placed, mostly in mass recruiting companies. The highest package is average. The majority of roles offered are software trainee and support engineer. Internships are limited and provided by a few local companies, resulting in placement opportunities that are not very strong.
content.Infrastructure: Campus has basic facilities like Wi-Fi, classrooms, labs, and a library, but they are not very well-maintained. Hostel facilities are average, with decent rooms. But the mess food quality is not up to the mark. Sports facilities are limited. Medical help is available only for basic needs.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: A good college option for BCA in Bhilwara.

content.Placements: Swift College offers decent placement opportunities with regular training sessions interview preparation and guidance from the placement cell. Some reputed companies visit the campus and many students get placed. There is still scope to bring in more diverse recruiters and higher package opportunities. Placements are satisfactory for students who prepare well.
content.Infrastructure: The college has pretty good infrastructure. We have a computer lab for projects and research, a fully stocked library with all the study material we need, and even indoor games to relax. The playground is a great spot for sports and activities. Overall, the facilities make college life comfortable and fun.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: It is the best college in Bhilwara. I am totally satisfied with it.

content.Placements: Other than students who wanted to go for higher studies, all are placed at good organisations. The highest package offered that year was 24 LPA, and the average package was 4 LPA. We got a chance for internship options as well, with different job profiles.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is good. We almost got everything we need. Facilities like classrooms, library, labs, and everything are provided. We also have an indoor playing area as well as a big field. I think the college has above-average infrastructure. There are no hostel facilities available. Medical facilities, sports and games facilities are also available here.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. (Hons.) in Environmental Science - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Maharshi Dayanand Saraswati University is good for study and budget-friendly.

content.Placements: There is a very low chance of placement in my course, B.Sc., but there is a good placement in other courses, like MBA. Highest placement is 20 LPA, but you have to score well above 8.5 CGPA in every semester. In my course, there is a very low chance of getting placement.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure available for my course is very good, all types of faculty are here, so there is no problem with labs, classrooms, and they provide books in library for rent. Canteen is decent but not very good, and a sports tournament is held every year in May.

admission_overview.title: MDSU Ajmer Admission Overview 2026
admission_overview.description:
MDSU admission process is both merit and entrance-based depending on the programme. Interested students can apply online on the official website of the university. Maharshi Dayanand Saraswati University, Ajmer commonly known as MDSU or MDSU Ajmer, offers UG, PG, doctoral, diploma, advanced diploma, and certificate courses in Management, Science, Arts, Commerce, and Social Science. Admission to the MDSU MBA is done on the basis of the CMAT score. The selection for MPhil is based Admission Eligibility Test (AET). Interested students can go through the sections below to know about the eligibility and admission process of Maharshi Dayanand Saraswati University courses. Download:
MDSU Prospectus

eligibility_selection.title: MDSU Ajmer Eligibility & Selection 2026
eligibility_selection.description: Maharshi Dayanand Saraswati University course admissions are offered only to eligible students. The university offers courses at UG, PG, diploma, and doctoral levels. Admissions to these courses are offered on either merit or entrance basis depending on the admission requirements. The university considers national-level exams for selective UG & PG programmes. For PhD, admission is based on the entrance test conducted by MDSU. The common eligibility is as below:

faqs.answer: Students have to meet the Maharshi Dayanand Saraswati University course eligibility to get admission. The minimum percentage may change depending on programme/ category. The common eligibility is as below:Maharshi Dayanand Saraswati University UG eligibility - Class 12 with relevant subjectsMaharshi Dayanand Saraswati University PG eligibility - UG degree in a relevant fieldMaharshi Dayanand Saraswati University PhD eligibility - PG degree in a relevant field
faqs.question: Who is eligible for Maharshi Dayanand Saraswati University admissions?

faqs.answer: Yes, an average student may get admission in MDSU Ajmer. The university offers UG, PG, PhD, and Diploma-level programmes. Admissions are given on both merit and entrance basis. Interested students can first check the eligibility and prepare for course admission. With the correct strategy, even an average student can get admission in the university.
faqs.question: Can an average student get admission in Maharshi Dayanand Saraswati University Ajmer?

faqs.answer: The admission process for majority of the courses at MDSU are merit-based. However, candidates wishing to apply to B.Ed or MEd are required to go through an entrance-based admission process. Candidates are judged over their performance in entrance exams such as PTET. Candidates who meet the entrance cutoff are invited for further admission rounds.
faqs.question: What are the courses at MDSU with entrance-based admission process?

faqs.answer: Aspirants who are willing to get admission to the LLB programme at MDSU must qualify for the basic eligibility criteria. As per the criteria, students seeking admission to the LLB course must have passed Class 12 examinations in any stream from a recognised board of India. Students must note that failure to fulfill can lead to rejection during the application stage.
faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for LLB course at MDSU?

paragraphs: MDSU admissionsare both merit and entrance-based. Students need to fill an online application form at the official site of the university. Before starting the process, students have to check and clear the eligibility. Find below all the steps for the detailedMDSU admission process:
MDSU Application 2026

Eligible candidates can fill the application form through online mode by going to the official website of Maharshi Dayanand Saraswati University. Along with that, they also need to pay the application fee and submit important documents.
Shortlisting of candidates

MDSU admission to all courses is done based on the merit scores obtained by candidates in the previous qualifying exam. Direct admission is offered to candidates who manage to meet the basic eligibility. The university may ask students to appear for other selection rounds if required as per the admission requirements of the programme.
Selecting candidates via Merit Lists
For the final selected candidates, Maharshi Dayanand Saraswati University releases its merit lists of the shortlisted candidates for various courses.

Maharshi Dayanand Saraswati University fees may include components, such as tuition fees, admission fees, etc. Candidates have to pay a certain amount of fees at the time of admission. The remaining are charged either yearly or semester-wise. Students can pay the amount through cash/ card/ UPI. The table below mentions theMDSU feesfor some of the popular programmes:
Note: Above information is taken from the official website and hence, is indicative.

MDSU seats vary for both on-campus and affiliated colleges. The university has more than7500 seatsfor B.Ed programme and it provides an excellent education at an affordable fee. MDSU admission will depend upon the number of candidates appearing for admission, seats allocated for each course etc. The MCA programme has a very limited seat while the MA programme has a large intake which is more than 5,500. The table below provides the seat intake for various courses offered at MDSU:
Note: Above information is taken from the official website and hence, is indicative.

The seat reservation is available for students belonging to different categories including SC, ST, and OBC-NCL. Also, 30% of seats (horizontal reservation) are provided to female students in the reservation category. Candidates seeking admission can check out the seat reservation details below at MDSU
Note: Above information is taken from the official website and hence, is indicative.

Candidates must make sure to follow the entrance-based admission process to get shortlisted for admission. The eligibility criteria that has been set by the institute requires candidates to have completed their graduation from a recognised university.

faqs.question: What is the course duration of B.Ed at MDSU?
faqs.answer: It takes students 2 years to complete the B.Ed course.Following rules by the National Council for Teacher Education (NCTE), this course lasts a certain amount of time everywhere in India.To give students a stronger teacher education, the B.Ed course was extended to 2 years instead of just 1 year. Candidates wishing to get a seat at the BEd course in MDSU must follow the entrance based admission process.

faqs.question: Is there any entrance exam for admission to LLM at MDSU?
faqs.answer: No, there is no entrance exam required for admission to LLM course at MDSU. Admission to a two-year LLM course is entirely merit-based. Students who hold a degree of LLB or PG Diploma in Law are eligible to apply for the course. Candidates have to submit their academic scorecards and certificate at the time of filling the application form. Based on their past academic records, students will be shortlisted.

faqs.question: Are admissions open at MDSU?
faqs.answer: MDSU admissions for UG & PG courses generally start in the month of May. The applications for other courses started around the same timeline. There are no the latest dates released by the university. Students can seek the estimation from this timeline for the upcoming admission dates for the next year. For more details around the lastest admission schedule, candidates are advised to visit the official website.

faqs.answer: In order to get admission to a two-year LLM course at MDSU, candidates must meet the basic eligibility criteria for the course. The minimum eligibility criteria to apply for the course is to have a PG degree of LLB or must have done PG Diploma in Law. MDSU offers direct admission to LLM aspirants based on the merit of their previous qualifying exam and past academic scores. Aspirants must submit their scorecard as the proof of education at the time of filling the application form.

faqs.question: What all courses does MDSU Ajmer offer?
faqs.answer: MDSU Ajmer offers UG, PG Diploma advanced Diploma, and Ph.D. programmes across Humanities & Social Sciences, Science, Management Studies, Engineering, Law, etc. Streams. At the undergraduate level, the university provides three to four-year B.Sc. BFA and BCA and one to four-year B.Ed courses to students. At the postgraduate level, the college offers two-year M.A. M.A. M.Tech, M.Ed MSW MPA and other courses to students. Maharshi Dayanand Saraswati University (MDSU) admission is both merits and entrance-based. Candidates are shortlisted through state and national-level examinations like MAT XAT GMAT CAT etc. Interested students can apply for the desired course at MDSU by submitting the application online by visiting the university website. Step 1: Candidates for admission must go to the university's official website. Step 2: Candidates can find an application form on the website. Step 3: Candidate registration is required initially. Step 4: Candidates who have registered must complete th

faqs.question: What is the passing marks for admission to MDSU?
faqs.answer: In order to get admission toUG & PG courses at MDSU, candidates have to fulfil the minimum educational requirements for the course. The eligibility criteria may differ for both UG & PG courses. Find below passing marks required for admission to top courses at MDSU:Course NameEligibilityMBA/PGDMBachelor's degree with 50% aggregateMScBachelor's degree with 50% aggregateMABachelor's degree with 48% to 55% aggregateMComBA with 48% aggregate (36% aggregate for SC/ ST/ OBC/ SBC)MCABCA/ BSc (CS)/ BSc (IT)/ BSc (Maths/ Bio)/ BA/ BCom or Vocational with at least 50% aggregateLLMLLB with 55% aggregate/ PGD Law with LLBMTechBE/ BTech or MSc (CS)/ MSc (IT), MSc (Physics)/ MSc (Maths) or MCA with at least 50% aggregateM.EdPass Graduation from a recognised universityB.EdPass Graduation from a recognised universityMSWGraduation in any discipline with at least 48% aggregatePG DiplomaGraduation in relevant discipline with minimum aggregate ranging between 40% and 50%

faqs.question: Are admissions to MDSU Ajmer PhD courses open?
faqs.answer: No, the MDSU Ajmer PhD admissions are yet to be opened for the academic year 2026. Candidates must go to the website of MDSU Ajmer to check if the PhD admissions are open.When the PhD admissions are opened, the admission portal of MDSU Ajmer will reflect the current academic year.

faqs.question: Is M.Sc. Available at MDSU?
faqs.answer: Yes, Maharshi Dayanand Saraswati University offers 2 year M.Sc. Programme in full-time mode. The course curriculum for each specialisation is divided into four semesters. M.Sc. Environmental Science, Microbiology, and Biotechnology are offered under the Choice Based Credit System where students can exit the course after successful completion of every semester. Admission to the MDSU M.Sc. Course is merit-based. Candidates seeking admission to Maharishi Dayanand Saraswati University Ajmer M.Sc. Need to meet the eligibility criteria. The eligibility criteria may vary based on the specialisation candidate opted for. The basic eligibility criteria is a graduation degree with a minimum of 50% marks from a recognised university or institute. The course fee of the M.Sc. Programme ranges from INR 700 to INR 1.44 Lacs.

faqs.answer: As per the official website, various recruiters visited every year at MDSU and placed students in new-age job roles. The top recruiters of who participated during the recent MDSU placements included ITC, Tata Group, Infosys, Tech Mahindra, Wipro, ICICI Bank, TCS, HDFC Bank, etc.

faqs.question: What is the average package offered at MDSU?
faqs.answer: The average package recorded during recent MDSU Ajmer placement drive was between INR 2.5 LPA and 4 LPA. Note : A verage package mentioned above has been taken from the students’ reviews on the Shiksha page.

faqs.question: What is the fees for MDSU Ajmer courses?
faqs.answer: Maharshi Dayanand Saraswati University Ajmer fees is different for each programme/ specialisation. The university charges the amount either yearly or semester-wise. Students can check the table below to know of the MDSU Ajmer fees for popular programmes: Course Name Total Tuition Fees BSc INR 21,000 - INR 1.4 lakh MCA INR 700 LLM INR 700 MTech INR 1,000 MBA INR 700 B.Ed INR 54,000

faqs.question: What is the fee for the M.A. Programme at MDSU?
faqs.answer: The total tuition fee for M.A. Programme offered by MDSU ranges from INR 700 to INR 62,500. The normal Master of Arts M.A. Programme at Maharshi Dayanand Saraswati University (MDSU) is a two-year programme. The course is full-time and is divided into four semesters. The university offers eight different specialisations for the M.A. The specialisations are Economics, Hindi Journalism and Mass Communication, History, Political Science, Population Studies, Sanskrit Vedic Vangmaya, and Geography. Candidates can submit an online application to be considered for M.A. Admission. MDSU M.A. Admission is solely merit-based. The basic eligibility criteria required to be able to apply for M.A. Programme is that the candidate should have a Bachelor degree with a minimum of 48% aggregate from a recognised institute or university.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Samrat Prithviraj Chauhan Government CollegeReviewed on 7 Sep 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Overall good, needs infrastructure upgradation.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure in our department are pretty decent, not so good but manageable. There is a library where the best material is available for all the courses, and our department, BBA, is proceeding to open a separate library only for this department, which would be a great add-on. There is a hostel facility available on campus which is pretty decent, with quality food and a separate canteen available. Sports and games fields are available with active engagement.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Government PG College, Merta CityReviewed on 5 Sep 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Average college with decent faculty members but weak placements.
reviews.review_text: Campus has basic facilities like Wi-Fi, classrooms, labs, and a library, but they are not very well-maintained. Hostel facilities are average, with decent rooms. But the mess food quality is not up to the mark. Sports facilities are limited. Medical help is available only for basic needs.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2018Offered by Swift CollegeReviewed on 1 Sep 2025)
reviews.review_heading: A good college option for BCA in Bhilwara.
reviews.review_text: The college has pretty good infrastructure. We have a computer lab for projects and research, a fully stocked library with all the study material we need, and even indoor games to relax. The playground is a great spot for sports and activities. Overall, the facilities make college life comfortable and fun.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by Swift CollegeReviewed on 30 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: It is the best college in Bhilwara. I am totally satisfied with it.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good. We almost got everything we need. Facilities like classrooms, library, labs, and everything are provided. We also have an indoor playing area as well as a big field. I think the college has above-average infrastructure. There are no hostel facilities available. Medical facilities, sports and games facilities are also available here.

reviews.review_heading: Maharshi Dayanand Saraswati University is good for study and budget-friendly.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure available for my course is very good, all types of faculty are here, so there is no problem with labs, classrooms, and they provide books in library for rent. Canteen is decent but not very good, and a sports tournament is held every year in May.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Kuchaman CollegeReviewed on 28 Jul 2025)
reviews.review_heading: I recommend everyone that you should visit once.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure are the best in our department. You can visit here once, we have 2 libraries in our college, one is the e-library where we are provided with Wi-Fi to study online, and the other is the library where books are issued. Sports and events also happen here.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Kuchaman CollegeReviewed on 28 Jul 2025)
reviews.review_heading: According to me, my college is the best in our Nagar district.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure of my college are absolutely good according to the city and my district. Our college provides everything like Wi-Fi, labs, library, smart classes, and so on. The quality of food in the mess and canteen is good. Medical facilities, sports, and games are also there.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Sophia Girls College, AjmerReviewed on 17 Jul 2025)
reviews.review_heading: It is a good college overall.
reviews.review_text: There are ACs in labs. There are water coolers and smart classes as well. There are proper hostels for students. It has many sports as well on the college campus. There is a canteen. The college organises picnics and trips. Medical facilities are also available.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by Aryabhatta International College of Technical EducationReviewed on 9 Jul 2025)
reviews.review_heading: It is the best college in this city.
reviews.review_text: We don't really get provided with Wi-Fi in the college. There are a total of 4 labs in the college, with 3 normal computer labs and one Apple lab with everything from Apple products. There are 14-15 rooms in the college and a library with a seminar hall, 2 theatre rooms, a cricket ground, a volleyball court, a basketball court, and a small cricket practice court. There is no hostel, but we get pretty much everything.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by Sophia Girls College, AjmerReviewed on 9 Jul 2025)
reviews.review_heading: My honest review about my college.
reviews.review_text: The mess was great. It provided good healthy food, lots of variety, and it changed everyday. College hostel was good too. I wasn't living there but from my friends I heard it was very good. They had an experience of their own.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2023Offered by Sophia Girls College, AjmerReviewed on 7 Jul 2025)
reviews.review_heading: My honest review about my college.
reviews.review_text: College had an environment of studies as well as extracurricular activities. I did not opt for hostel. But as per my hostel friends, the hostel infrastructure and facilities were well taken. The warden was quite good, and the discipline was maintained. I did not know what the fee for the hostel now.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Sophia Girls College, AjmerReviewed on 7 Jul 2025)
reviews.review_heading: My honest review about my college.
reviews.review_text: Hostel is very good as it has all the required equipment and facilities with an amazing view of greenery. The mess is all good as every day a nutritionist looks after what is being cooked and served to the students. 4 students with sufficient space for each. Hostels have rules and regulations that are to be followed strictly by the students.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Sophia Girls College, AjmerReviewed on 2 Jul 2025)
reviews.review_heading: The best girls' college for study in Ajmer. Infrastructure and management, as there is a place.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available across the campus, including classrooms and labs. The labs are well-equipped with the latest software for finance and marketing. The classrooms are spacious and have smart boards and projectors. The library is a vast collection of journals, business and management books, and e-resources.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2022Offered by Sophia Girls College, AjmerReviewed on 21 Jun 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied because everything is really good.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure and hostel are available, and all the facilities are available if you want an aesthetic library, labs, or anything, everything is there including a gym, swimming pool, and art room, you can even do whatever you want in hobbies-photography, sketching, cooking, artist work, everything. And the hostel has average food, but you can use the canteen to eat, and the college also provides sports and games like cricket, boxing, basketball, badminton, chess, and a lot.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Samrat Prithviraj Chauhan Government CollegeReviewed on 7 Jun 2025)
reviews.review_heading: If you planning to do MBA after BBA you can join this college.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good but there are no facilities like Wi-Fi. Wi-Fi is only available in library and other facilities are good like library, classroom, and labs. There is only a girls hostel and facilities of girls hostel are okay. I rate it 4 out of 5.

review_summary.college_name: St Ann's College for Women Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: It is the best college for the MBA course.

content.Placements: This year, over 73 percent of students secured jobs in a variety of industries. The highest package offered is 26 LPA. The average package ranges from 15-16 LPA. Firms that took on the project include ZS Associates, American Express, KPMG, etc. Top positions offered include investment banker, financial manager, etc. Internships are also available.
content.Infrastructure: The college provides Wi-Fi connectivity to all students on campus. We have a library in each department. There is a separate library for like universities that is available 24x7 all year. Hostels also have reading/study areas. Exercise and activities are also held indoors.

individual_reviews.course: B.A. (Economic, Public Administration, Political Science) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Best college for Women in Hyderabad, An Autonomous College for Women.

content.Placements: The St Anns College for Women had a placement cell, where they try to provide 100% placements for the students and provide equal opportunities for each one. The package is also good, starting from 3LPA and going for 12LPA, and the placement has various companies such as Amazon, Dell, Deloitte, and more.
content.Infrastructure: The College infrastructure was amazing, it had huge playgrounds, and the sports corners were amazing. Many state level competitions will be conducted in the college itself. The famous Badminton player PV Sindhu was from St. Anns College for Women. College was very supportive towards the Co Curricular Activities and Sports corners.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Physical Sciences - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: It's a great college. It is the best for women. Faculty members are very friendly.

content.Placements: Placements are quite good. Students are placed according to their qualifications and capabilities. One of my friends is placed in a good organisation and is doing well with her job. I would like to recommend the college for women as it is the best for them.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good enough. Classrooms have few fans, but they are good enough. Washrooms are a little congested, but are neat and clean.
content.Faculty: Faculty members of every course are very friendly and help us clear our doubts easily. They establish a positive environment in the classroom. We have well-associated and well-educated professors. Teachers are passionate about teaching students new topics.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Biological Sciences - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Fully satisfied with the college faculty and the courses available there.

content.Placements: 75% of students are placed in many companies like TCS, HGS, Deloitte, Accenture, Cognizant, and many more MNCs. Students from any course can apply for the above companies if they are willing to work. The starting package provided by the companies is Rs. 30,000.
content.Infrastructure: For my course, labs are there for different subjects and the library. Classrooms have projectors and LCDs. Students who want to eat something, canteens are available till the closing time of the college. Students can also enjoy the environment present in the college.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Physical Sciences - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Serenity study at St. Ann's.

content.Placements: Mostly BPO and BPS roles were offered in placements with IT roles being rare depending on students' interests. However they prepared us for everything including soft skills. Every student was eligible for placements ensuring that no one was left out.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure wise and campus wise there was no doubt at all as it was perfect and well maintained. The canteen had reasonable prices and there was also a sick room. Sports classes were mandatory twice a week, which we enjoyed a lot, and sometimes we also participated in competitions.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college for the MBA course.
reviews.review_text: The college provides Wi-Fi connectivity to all students on campus. We have a library in each department. There is a separate library for like universities that is available 24x7 all year. Hostels also have reading/study areas. Exercise and activities are also held indoors.

reviews.review_heading: Best college for Women in Hyderabad, An Autonomous College for Women.
reviews.review_text: The College infrastructure was amazing, it had huge playgrounds, and the sports corners were amazing. Many state level competitions will be conducted in the college itself. The famous Badminton player PV Sindhu was from St. Anns College for Women. College was very supportive towards the Co Curricular Activities and Sports corners.

reviews.review_heading: It's a great college. It is the best for women. Faculty members are very friendly.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good enough. Classrooms have few fans, but they are good enough. Washrooms are a little congested, but are neat and clean.

reviews.review_heading: Fully satisfied with the college faculty and the courses available there.
reviews.review_text: For my course, labs are there for different subjects and the library. Classrooms have projectors and LCDs. Students who want to eat something, canteens are available till the closing time of the college. Students can also enjoy the environment present in the college.

reviews.review_heading: Serenity study at St. Ann's.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure wise and campus wise there was no doubt at all as it was perfect and well maintained. The canteen had reasonable prices and there was also a sick room. Sports classes were mandatory twice a week, which we enjoyed a lot, and sometimes we also participated in competitions.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, my college is good.
reviews.review_text: Now, the college infrastructure is quite good compared to the old one. Now, my college has been renovated because of the NAAC peer team visit, so it's quite good. The washrooms have been modified, and the auditorium is just amazing. The college even has good facilities for recording sports.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure, good extracurricular activities, and a lot of fun along with studies.
reviews.review_text: We don't have hostel facilities in our college, but the infrastructure is really good. Apart from the classrooms, they are not well-ventilated, and there are no ACs in the classrooms. We have Wi-Fi for different departments, and we have a very well-built auditorium, AV room, and a separate conference hall for meetings, orientation, events, and conferences.

reviews.review_heading: Experienced and revised review.
reviews.review_text: The services provided are pretty vast. We have a good canteen, a neat campus with different grounds, and classrooms for each course and tier specialty are separate. There are huge auditoriums and seminar halls, and a library with a wide range of books from every subject. However, Wi-Fi is not provided, and there is no hostel facility from this college. But various reliable and trusted hostels are nearby.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and faculty. Average placement in 2024.
reviews.review_text:
Labs are available and are maintained by lab attendants neatly.
The library is good and has a pretty good collection of books.
Canteen is hygiene and the food is good.
Classrooms are clean and have individual chairs and tables. However, some classes contain benches.

reviews.review_heading: A reliable review you can TRUST.
reviews.review_text: The college is pretty good campus-wise, food-wise, and classrooms-wise. The library has a variety of books related to our studies, and for book lovers, there are many poetry and storybooks available. I didn't attend any hostels, but there are many hostels nearby the college.

reviews.review_heading: St. Ann's college for women.
reviews.review_text: The overall infrastructure of our college is really good. We are served high-quality food in a hygienic manner. All medical facilities are available within our campus. There is free Wi-Fi available all over the college campus. Our classrooms are maintained neatly with all the necessary facilities.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college for the MS.c course.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides very good facilities and infrastructure. Our college provides free Wi-Fi. All classrooms are good. All labs are good. The library is well-stocked. The hostel facility is available in our college. |

reviews.review_heading: Our college has good teachers.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides good facilities and infrastructure. Our college provides free Wi-Fi and other facilities. All classrooms and labs are well-equipped. The library is well-stocked. The hostel facility is not available in our college.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college for women.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. Our campus is huge. Our college has good surroundings. The hostel facilities are not much good. Wi-Fi facility is available in the hostel. Our college has many labs. The library is well-stocked. They organise sports activities.

reviews.review_heading: It should dream college.
reviews.review_text: College have Wi-Fi. Labs are well facilitated and all the required things are available. Classroom are well managed. Library have almost 5k books and generals. Canteen food is nice and affordable. Sport courts and clubs are there. Hostel is not there.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Janardan Rai Nagar Rajasthan Vidyapeeth University - JRNRVU offers a wide range of programmes to students at the UG and PG levels. The college is mainly concerned with streams such as Engineering, Medicine & Health Sciences and Business & Management Studies. At the UG level, the college offers courses such as B.E. / B.Tech, After 10th Diploma and D.Pharma. At the PG level, the college offers courses such as MBA/PGDM, MCA and MD. Janardan Rai Nagar Rajasthan Vidyapeeth University - JRNRVU courses are offered to students in Full Time and Part Time mode. Further, the fees structure for Janardan Rai Nagar Rajasthan Vidyapeeth University - JRNRVU courses stands around INR 36,000 to 6,97,500.

reviews_list.batch_info: BHMS - Bachelor of Homeopathic Medicine and Surgery - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: It is a good college with good faculty members.

review_content.Placements: Our college doesn't provide any placement. It is not an engineering or MBA course that you can get placements from several companies. It is a medical course so they give you a degree and then you have to fight with several exams or pass the interviews in the hospitals to get a job. Some students got placed in foreign countries. Around 10% of the students got internships from this college.

answer.text: There are plenty of jobs for fresh Computer Science Engineering graduates. Candidates from top notch engineering colleges get attractive job offers from IT MNCs. CSE course graduates can also get jobs in non-IT companies like universities, research, private and public industries, government departments, business organisations, commercial organisations and the manufacturing sector, etc.You also have plenty of options to work in different departments such as design, development, assembly, manufacture and maintenance, etc. Working as programmer, web developer, and E- commerce specialist with telecommunications companies, automotive companies, aerospace companies, etc. can be a lucrative career option as well. individual_reviews.course: BHMS - Bachelor of Homeopathic Medicine and Surgery - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: I am absolutely satisfied with the faculty.

content.Placements: The university had good placements. About 90% of students got job opportunities. The salary packages offered were average. There is the BHMS MD course. The position of a medical officer, RMO, or assistant position can be provided after passing BHMS. Every hospital needs RMO for IPD. There are many positions in BHMS.
content.Infrastructure: Good infrastructure was available on campus. The hostel and its facilities were good. Course infrastructure was good. Hostel infrastructure was also good and well-mannered. Wi-Fi, lab, and library were available. Proper hygienic surroundings and good quality food were provided.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Our college offers good learning and experiences.

content.Placements: Placements in our college are good because every year very reputed companies visit the campus for recruitment and students have to work hard for that. Around 60% of the students get placed from college. Companies like TCI, ICICI Prudential, Airtel, and Mahindra Finance visit the campus for recruitment. Almost 75% of the students got internships with a stipend of Rs. 5,000 per month - Rs. 10,000 per month. Best roles are offered in our course. Various seminars are also organised in which top businessman visits our college so that students can learn from their experiences.

individual_reviews.course: BHMS - Bachelor of Homeopathic Medicine and Surgery - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: It is a good college with good faculty members.

content.Placements: Our college doesn't provide any placement. It is not an engineering or MBA course that you can get placements from several companies. It is a medical course so they give you a degree and then you have to fight with several exams or pass the interviews in the hospitals to get a job. Some students got placed in foreign countries. Around 10% of the students got internships from this college.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is available but not working. They don't even correct it. Labs are good but the quantity of infrastructure is less. Classrooms are good enough but they can be better. The library is small and they don't have enough books for all the students. The books always run out of stock.

individual_reviews.title: Review of RDJM Medical College and Hospital.

content.Placements: Placement opportunities are available in the college. The package ranges from Rs. 60,000 to Rs. 70,000. The college provides placements to students on campus. Everyone must do an internship in the college after the final year of the course. We are supposed to work under senior doctors.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is quite good, and they are still working on it. Classrooms are well-equipped with smartboards and biometrics. Labs, classrooms, and library are all good. The hostel is comfortable, with attached washrooms and AC. The canteen is available, and the medical facilities are good. There are fewer provisions for games and sports.

reviews_list.batch_info: M.Pharm. in Pharmaceutics - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: I like the classrooms of the college which are good.

review_content.Placements: For M.Pharma students in the final year, the placements begin. Companies like Iqvia, Covance, Biocon, and pharma leaf companies visit for placements. The highest package given is 4 LPA by Biocon. Not all the students will be placed but almost 60% of the students from ADEPT will be placed by the college placements. I am planning to work for men in the pharma sector.
review_content.Infrastructure: Yes, I do stay at the hostel. a satisfactory and cool place, which made my heart happy. The pharmacy hostel is a two-shared room with attached washrooms. The hostel is kept clean and it's cleaned every day. The hostel has a beautiful mess and good hygiene. Students are given a Wi-Fi facility. Good-cleaning aunties and kind wardens are there.

reviews_list.batch_info: Diploma in Pharmacy (D.Pharma.) - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: Review of Nitte Gulabi Shetty Memorial Institute of Pharmaceutical Sciences.

review_content.Placements: The placement percentage is about 40%–50% based on the previous batch. Apollo Pharmacy provides internships for students, and it hires students after they complete their internships. A salary package of 2 LPA is provided by Apollo. A student with a diploma in pharmacy can work as a pharmacist, a medical representative, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is very good. Classrooms are spacious. They have smart boards and projectors. Labs are well equipped with the necessary requirements. Free Wi-Fi is provided for all students. There is a huge library from which students can borrow books for reference. They also provide the textbooks required for the course. We should pay Rs. 1000 for 2 years. Later, the books can be returned. The hostel is situated at the university. The food is good. Free medical facilities are provided by KS Hegde Hospital. Two students can stay in a room. Each room has an attached bathroom, separate cupboards, a study table, a chair, and cots. The hostel fee is Rs. 96,000. There is a caution deposit of Rs. 2,000 in the first year. The caution deposit will be returned when you move out of the hostel permanently.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Placements, infrastructure, and quality of teaching is good. Overall its good.

content.Placements: Placements were not available before. Now, there are many companies looking and offering us opportunities for work. Students do internships in hospital pharmacies and other companies. There is a placement officer with whom we have to communicate after our studies.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is available to each and every student by filling out a form. Labs are very well-equipped with chemicals and equipment. Classrooms are fitted with microphones and projectors. The library is very well-equipped with lots of benches and desks for studying and other work. There are newspaper articles and many books.

I am planning to work for men in the pharma sector.
content.Infrastructure: Yes, I do stay at the hostel. a satisfactory and cool place, which made my heart happy. The pharmacy hostel is a two-shared room with attached washrooms. The hostel is kept clean and it's cleaned every day. The hostel has a beautiful mess and good hygiene. Students are given a Wi-Fi facility. Good-cleaning aunties and kind wardens are there.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: The college is good but hostel facilities are not that great.

content.Placements: Placements are not as promised by the college. They say that they provide good placements. Nothing is provided in the college. admission_overview.college_name: Nitte Gulabi Shetty Memorial Institute of Pharmaceutical Sciences Admission 2025: Eligibility, Selection, Application

paragraphs: Nitte Gulabi Shetty Memorial Institute of Pharmaceutical Sciences admissionis based on merit of the qualifying exam.NGSM Institute of Pharmaceutical Sciencesoffers four courses at undergraduate, postgraduate, diploma and doctoral levels. The college offers courses under theDepartment of Pharmaceutics, Pharmaceutical Chemistry, Pharmacy Practice, Pharmacognosy, Pharmacology & Teaching Hospital. Candidates who meet the course-specific eligibility criteria can apply online for admission through the official website.

NGSM Institute of Pharmaceutical Sciences admissionstypically starts in themonth of April and ends in September, every year. Admission to most of the courses at the college is merit-based. Candidates, however, for all courses are required to meet minimum eligibility criteria to get shortlisted for any and every course offered by NGSM Institute of Pharmaceutical Sciences. Check below popularNGSM Institute of Pharmaceutical Sciences coursesalong with theireligibility and selection criteria:
The candidates should pass in 10+2 with at least 45% marks in Chemistry, Physics and Biology/Mathematics with English as one of the subjects.
Age:Minimum 17 years as of 31st December of the year of admission
Pass in DPharm course with at least 45% marks.
The candidates should pass the PUC/10+2 with science subjects
Age:Minimum 17 years as of 31st December of the year of admission
Pharm D ( Post Baccalaureate)
The candidates should pass in B.Pharm from an institution approved by the PCI.

NGSM Institute of Pharmaceutical Sciences course admissions 2025for all of its courses are based on merit secured in the qualifying exam. Check below the complete NGSM Institute of Pharmaceutical Sciences admission process:Step 1: Application Process

The mode of application is online. Interested candidates have to submit an admission query form available on the official website. On receipt of the same, the Admission Section will guide the students through the process of registration and admission.
Step 2: Selection Rounds
Admission to all the NGSM Institute of Pharmaceutical Sciences courses is based on merit-secured in the qualifying exam.
Step 3: Admission Confirmation
Once the selection rounds are done, the shortlisted candidates are called for document verification. Aspirants must pay a course fee to confirm their seat in the college.

Interested candidates have to submit an admission query form available on the official website. On receipt of the same, the Admission Section will guide the students through the process of registration and admission.Selection rounds:Admission to all the NGSM Institute of Pharmaceutical Sciences courses is done based on merit-secured in the qualifying exam.Admission confirmation:Once the selection rounds are done, the shortlisted candidates are called for document verification. Aspirants need to pay a course fee to confirm their seat in the college.

faqs.question: What are the courses offered at NGSM Institute of Pharmaceutical Sciences?
faqs.answer: NGSM Institute of Pharmaceutical Sciences offers a wide range of UG, PG, Doctoral, Diploma programmes in the field of Pharmaceutics, Pharmaceutical Chemistry, Pharmacy Practice, Pharmacognosy, Pharmacology & Teaching Hospital, among others. Admission to a majority of courses at NGSM Institute of Pharmaceutical Sciences is merit based. Interested students can apply for these courses online. A list of courses offered by NGSM Institute of Pharmaceutical Sciences is as follows:BPharmPharmDPharmD (Post Baccalaureate)MPharm

paragraphs: NGSM Institute of Pharmaceutical Sciences has released the NIRF report 2024. According to the report, 44 UG 4-years and 78 PG 2-years students were placed during NGSMIPS placements 2023. Further, the median package offered to UG 4-year and PG 2-year students during NGSM Institute of Pharmaceutical Sciences placements 2023 was INR 2.64 LPA and INR 3.62 LPA , respectively. The top recruiters of NGSM Institute of Pharmaceutical Sciences in the past years included Biocon, Atrimed, Micro Labs, Medopharma, Cipla, Aster Medical Centre, GSK, Sun Pharma, etc .

hostel_campus.college_name: Nitte Gulabi Shetty Memorial Institute of Pharmaceutical Sciences Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description: The hostellers are provided with a cot, cupboard, study table and chair. Every hostel has solar water heaters, WiFi facility, common telephone, TV room, reading room, visitors lounge, water coolers, generators, 24x7 security and surveillance cameras. AC rooms are available in some of the hostels. The hostels also have facilities for indoor and outdoor games.
facilities: Library: The institute has a well-stocked library with a large floor area of 3230 sq. ft. It has a rich collection of Printed Books, Back Volumes, W.H.O Publications and CD-ROM. The Library subscribes to National and International journals in print and e-journals and is also a member of the HELINET consortium, DELNET and UpToDate: Evidence-Based Medical decision support service resource. The Library is fully automated with Easylib web version software (ILMS) and computerized through a Bar-coding system. It is also well protected with a fire extinguisher and CCTV surveillance system

Gym: The air-conditioned multi Gymnasium housed in a 5500 sq. ft building is kept open from 6 am to 10 pm for the benefit of students and hostellers. The services of 3 professionally trained instructors are available. Equipment consists of Treadmills, elliptical trainers, exercise bikes, rowing machines and a full-fledged multi-gym.
Shuttle Service: A fleet of buses and vans are maintained on the campus to provide transport facilities to the students and staff, free of cost.
Hospital/Medical Facilities: Students can avail of medical and dental treatment at the 1000-bed multispecialty Justice KS Hegde Charitable Hospital and the A B Shetty Dental College Hospital.

reviews.review_heading: Placements, infrastructure, and quality of teaching is good. Overall its good.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available to each and every student by filling out a form. Labs are very well-equipped with chemicals and equipment. Classrooms are fitted with microphones and projectors. The library is very well-equipped with lots of benches and desks for studying and other work. There are newspaper articles and many books.

reviews.review_heading: I like the classrooms of the college which are good.
reviews.review_text: Yes, I do stay at the hostel. a satisfactory and cool place, which made my heart happy. The pharmacy hostel is a two-shared room with attached washrooms. The hostel is kept clean and it's cleaned every day. The hostel has a beautiful mess and good hygiene. Students are given a Wi-Fi facility. Good-cleaning aunties and kind wardens are there.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Nitte Gulabi Shetty Memorial Institute of Pharmaceutical Sciences.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good. Classrooms are spacious. They have smart boards and projectors. Labs are well equipped with the necessary requirements. Free Wi-Fi is provided for all students. There is a huge library from which students can borrow books for reference. They also provide the textbooks required for the course. We should pay Rs. 1000 for 2 years. Later, the books can be returned. The hostel is situated at the university. The food is good. Free medical facilities are provided by KS ...

reviews.review_heading: The college is good but hostel facilities are not that great.
reviews.review_text: Hostel food is not great. Classrooms are old enough. Wi-Fi is great in some places. The library is good and peaceful. The cafeteria is not that great. Uniform colors are not good. Bus facilities are good. They have bus facilities to almost all places in the city.

college_info.college_name: Punyashlok Ahilyadevi Holkar Solapur University

highlights.summary:
The MAH MBA CET 2026 registration period is now over for Punyashlok Ahilyadevi Holkar Solapur University admission to the MBA/MMS courses. The session 1 exam will be conducted tentatively from Apr 6 to Apr 8, 2026, and the session 2 exam will be held on May 9, 2026(Tentative).

A few more updates are given below:

placements.overview:
Punyashlok Ahilyadevi Holkar Solapur University was founded in 2004. It is a public university and is located in Solapur, Maharashtra. Punyashlok Ahilyadevi Holkar Solapur University courses are offered to students at the UG, PG and Certificate levels. The institute is approved by AICTE and offers courses in both Full Time and Part Time modes. Punyashlok Ahilyadevi Holkar Solapur University offers a total of 171 courses in streams such as Engineering, Medicine & Health Sciences, Business & Management Studies, IT & Software, Accounting & Commerce and Arts ( Fine / Visual / Performing ). Some of the popular courses offered at the institute are B.E. / B.Tech, MBA/PGDM, M.Sc., MCA and B.Arch and the total seat intake for the available courses is 1581. These courses are offered to students across several specialisations such as Acting, Agriculture, Apache Hadoop, Apparel Design and Automation. Further, the fee for all these courses ranges between INR 500 to 88,000 and the average median salary is around . Apart from this, the Punyashlok Ahilyadevi Holkar Solapur University campus has a state-of-the-art infrastructure with all the advanced facilities.

Q. How many courses do Solapur University offer?

A. Solapur University offers a total of 70 courses.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Review of the SVERI Institute.

review_content.Placements: 50 percent of students were placed, and 50 percent of students took admission for post-graduation through the GPAT NIPER examination. The starting package is about Rs. 3,00,000 - 4,00,000. Companies like TCS and TCMS provided placements. Activities related to placements, such as aptitude tests and mock interviews, were conducted weekly.
review_content.Infrastructure: The overall infrastructure of the college and institute is very good, as it has large classrooms, a laboratory for doing practicals, a seminar hall, a sports hall, a conference hall, an open amphitheater, etc. The library is also available for study, and it includes all books related to competitive exams, course books, and other personal development books.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Best college of pharmacy in Solapur.

review_content.Placements: Placements are average. From my batch, around 7-8 are placed in various companies. Companies like TCMS, TCS, Omega Healthcare, etc, visit our college for placements. Also, in 3rd year of the Bachelor's program, a one-year internship programme is compulsory, to gain outside knowledge for students.
review_content.Infrastructure: The hostel is very bad. The rules and regulations of the hostel are too strict. They don't allow you to go outside for anything. They check your phones. There is no meaning of privacy in a hostel. In a small room, there are 7 girls. Common washrooms and toilets are very hygienic.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Arts (B.A.) - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Very good choice if you want to get a bachelor's degree with low fees and other expenses.

review_content.Placements: Less than 50% of students get placed in my course, B.A. The highest package is around 5 LPA, the average is around 2.5 LPA, and the lowest is 1.8 LPA. Top recruiting companies are TCS and other local and education-related companies. Around 30% of students get internships in college and other local education-related companies. The top roles are teacher and education counselor.
review_content.Infrastructure: There are facilities like a library, labs, classrooms, Wi-Fi, bathrooms, and study areas. Hostel facilities include good and healthy food, a canteen, a first aid kit, a sports ground, good and clean rooms for students, and clean toilets. The quality of the food is the best and felt like you are eating what your mom makes for you.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: College is nice, and facilities are also nice. I recommend this college.

review_content.Placements: Here, 30 students were placed out of 40. Placement is average. Highest package is 12 LPA, and lowest package is 4 LPA. Here, some communication companies, such as Wipro, are listed. Students are given proper training of interviews. More students are placed by placement cell, which is nice.
review_content.Infrastructure: There are two hostels, one for first year and another for second year, third year, and final year. First-year hostel has common toilets, and other hostel has an attached bathroom. All things are properly worked. They have a separate girls' hostel and hot water 24 hours a day for batch.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Good faculty and good placements. Good infrastructure and facilities.

review_content.Placements: My college is very good. About 95% of students got placed. The highest package is 40 LPA. Many top companies prefer to take interviews and select students in my college. I am honestly proud to be a part of this college.
review_content.Infrastructure: SVERI College of Engineering has a very nice and clean hostel. The infrastructure of the college is very good and nice. Many computer labs are available in college. The Wi-Fi connection is clear and no issues with that. The big library is available in my college.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Science (B.Sc.) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Course is good, placements are bad, infrastructure is fine, faculty is great, facilities are great.

review_content.Placements: 10% of students get placed in my course. It's a difficult course so most avoid it. The highest and the lowest is same 5 LPA basis. Recruiting company is TCS. Placements are done outside at least when I completed it. Now with NEP they are promising 100% placements, we will have to see when that happens. Roles that are offered at TCS where technical support is not required. Major could go up from there if you have skills besides the course.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is developing, and they are building hostels for male and female students. For B.Sc. students, labs are available. Chemistry, physics, and bio have large halls for labs. Mathematics has a single room as lab which 3rd year students use as a class. Library has a lot of books, it has thousands of books in physical form. It has e-library which constitutes majority. College hostel is usually full but in next year or so new hostels will be open. College doesn't have mess of its own but will give you contacts for mess which will deliver food to your room.

paragraphs: Punyashlok Ahilyadevi Holkar Solapur University admissions are entrance-based. Candidates must appear for certain entrance exams to take admission. The college offers a variety of courses to the candidates at the UG, PG, After 10th and Certificate level in the field of Engineering, Medicine and Health Sciences, Business and Management Studies, IT and Software, Accounting and Commerce, Arts ( Fine / Visual / Performing ), Design, Mass Communication and Media, Architecture and Planning, Law, Humanities and Social Sciences, Hospitality and Travel, Science, Teaching and Education, Beauty and Fitness, Banking and Finance and Insurance. Read below for more details on Punyashlok Ahilyadevi Holkar Solapur University admission process:

description: Punyashlok Ahilyadevi Holkar Solapur University Cutoff 2025 has been released for all rounds and categories for admission to MCA courses based on the MAH MCA CET exam. Students can also scroll down the page to know the cutoff of various other accepting exams. A few more exam-related updates are below:

The Punyashlok Ahilyadevi Holkar Solapur University MAH MBA CET cutoff 2025 is provided in the table below for MBA/PGDM admission, among other courses. The cutoff was released across different categories. For the General AI category, the last-round cutoff percentile for MBA admission was 8.41. For the same course, the cutoff stood at 32.26 in the first round. More details are given below:

Candidates can refer to the table below to view and compare the last three years of MAH MBA CET cutoff data for admission to the MBA course. In 2025, the last round cutoff for MBA admission at Punyashlok Ahilyadevi Holkar Solapur University was 8.41. For the same course, the last round cutoff was 20.71 in 2024, while in 2023, the cutoff was concluded at 15.67.

Maharashtra Common Entrance Test (MAH CET) is a state level management entrance test for admission to MBA/MMS courses. The MAH MBA CET 2025 cutoff has been released for all rounds and categories. Students can view other important dates for MAH MBA CET 2026 in the table below:

Analysing MAH MBA CET cutoff trends provides invaluable insights to students into how admission dynamics and competitiveness for different courses change over time. Students can download year-wise cutoff lists from the table given below to have a better idea of the cutoff percentile changes over the years.

Punyashlok Ahilyadevi Holkar Solapur University MAH MCA CET Cutoff 2025 has been released for all rounds and categories for students belonging to the All India and Home State quota. According to the MAH MCA CET Cutoff 2025, the cutoff for MCA course admission ranged from 80 to 58.79 for the candidates belonging to the General AI category.

As per the MCA Cutoff 2025 for the General category candidates under the Home State quota, the cutoff in the last round of admission was 58.79, whereas, in 2024, admissions were closed at a percentile of 23.81, and in 2023, the last round cutoff was 42.51. This pattern over the years suggests that the competition for MCA admission is fluctuating over the past 3 years.
