hostel_campus.college_name: Punyashlok Ahilyadevi Holkar Solapur University Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by SVERI's College of PharmacyReviewed on 23 Nov 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Review of the SVERI Institute.
reviews.review_text: The overall infrastructure of the college and institute is very good, as it has large classrooms, a laboratory for doing practicals, a seminar hall, a sports hall, a conference hall, an open amphitheater, etc. The library is also available for study, and it includes all books related to competitive exams, course books, and other personal development books.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by SVERI's College of PharmacyReviewed on 20 Nov 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Best college of pharmacy in Solapur.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is very bad. The rules and regulations of the hostel are too strict. They don't allow you to go outside for anything. They check your phones. There is no meaning of privacy in a hostel. In a small room, there are 7 girls. Common washrooms and toilets are very hygienic.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Shriiman Bhaushaeb Zadbuke MahavidyalayaReviewed on 26 Jun 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Very good choice if you want to get a bachelor's degree with low fees and other expenses.
reviews.review_text: There are facilities like a library, labs, classrooms, Wi-Fi, bathrooms, and study areas. Hostel facilities include good and healthy food, a canteen, a first aid kit, a sports ground, good and clean rooms for students, and clean toilets. The quality of the food is the best and felt like you are eating what your mom makes for you.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Brahmdevdada Mane Institute of TechnologyReviewed on 26 Jul 2025)
reviews.review_heading: College is nice, and facilities are also nice. I recommend this college.
reviews.review_text: There are two hostels, one for first year and another for second year, third year, and final year. First-year hostel has common toilets, and other hostel has an attached bathroom. All things are properly worked. They have a separate girls' hostel and hot water 24 hours a day for batch.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by SVERI's College of Engineering, PandharpurReviewed on 11 Jun 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Good faculty and good placements. Good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: SVERI College of Engineering has a very nice and clean hostel. The infrastructure of the college is very good and nice. Many computer labs are available in college. The Wi-Fi connection is clear and no issues with that. The big library is available in my college.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Walchand College of Arts and ScienceReviewed on 5 Sep 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Course is good, placements are bad, infrastructure is fine, faculty is great, facilities are great.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is developing, and they are building hostels for male and female students. For B.Sc. students, labs are available. Chemistry, physics, and bio have large halls for labs. Mathematics has a single room as lab which 3rd year students use as a class. Library has a lot of books, it has thousands of books in physical form. It has e-library which constitutes majority. College hostel is usually full but in next year or so new hostels will be open. College doesn't have mess of its own but ...

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by D.B.F. Dayanand College of Arts and ScienceReviewed on 21 Apr 2025)
reviews.review_heading: It is a really good college. Placements are good but you should definitely take admission here.
reviews.review_text: The college has Wi-Fi facility. Computer labs are also available. There is a library at the college. All these things are very beneficial. Good things are taught in our college. We really enjoy the event. Classrooms are very big and we enjoy it a lot.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Walchand College of Arts and ScienceReviewed on 6 Mar 2025)
reviews.review_heading: It's a very simple unique and peaceful college where you'd find what's exactly needed.
reviews.review_text: The hostel has decent rooms and comparatively good quality food at the mess, in times and out times are fixed and efficient. There are shops and required things around the hostel itself and the area around it is also suitable for a student studying whatever degree.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Brahmdevdada Mane Institute of TechnologyReviewed on 13 Feb 2025)
reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely satisfied because of the faculty and good placement.
reviews.review_text: The course facilities are good. The college campus is large, beautiful, and well-maintained. The hostel is also great for staying. Bus service is also good college classes are very big.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2023Offered by V. G. Shivdare College of Arts, Commerce And ScienceReviewed on 2 Feb 2025)
reviews.review_heading: The infrastructure and the facilities they provide are not good.
reviews.review_text: The college has no fascinating infrastructure. Wi-Fi is not probably accessible to students. There are roughly few smart classrooms in the college. There is no hostel facility. The labs in the college are also not enough standardized for this course.

reviews.review_heading: A good institution to pursue a master's.
reviews.review_text: Pretty good facilities are available in the department like advanced laboratories, a well-managed digitalized library, and digitalized classrooms. There is a good hostel with different facilities like Wi-Fi and a gymnasium. There is no mess in the university hostel. We have a big ground for different sports activities.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Brahmdevdada Mane Institute of TechnologyReviewed on 25 Jan 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied because of the faculty members and education system.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms such facilities and fresh environment infrastructure are available for our course or department. Facilities in our hostel are also very hygienic. Medical facilities are available for hostel students immediately. Our college achieved many national and international levels of prizes in sports and games.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Brahmdevdada Mane Institute of TechnologyReviewed on 16 Dec 2024)
reviews.review_heading: If you are a mechanical engineering student then this college for you.
reviews.review_text: The labs were in good condition and well-equipped. Wi-Fi was available for office use. Hostels were available for both boys and girls but the food quality at the mess was not so good. The canteen was not so good either. But the best thing was the library which was big enough.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by SVERI's College of Engineering, PandharpurReviewed on 14 Dec 2024)
reviews.review_heading: Really good discipline in college.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure: Wi-Fi of 1Gbps, labs, classrooms, library, study room, medical facilities, all in one general store, canteen. For medical facilities, a doctor is near the hostel itself, and the quality of mess food is sometimes okay, sometimes not okay, but in the canteen, food is awesome.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by SVERI's College of Engineering, PandharpurReviewed on 6 Dec 2024)
reviews.review_heading: SVERI's College of Engineering, Pandharpur review.
reviews.review_text: The college and the hostel are good. Both have excellent infrastructure and provide free Wi-Fi. The college has two buildings, and the hostel has three buildings for girls and three for boys. The boys' and girls' hostels are located some distance apart.

reviews_list.batch_info: BAMS - Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: Our college has good faculty members, but the infrastructure is bad.

review_content.Placements: In this college, at the time of internships we get local area hospital duties, and many students get opportunities to work in the village. As in internship students get in-half experience by working with many senior doctors, consultants and get knowledge from it. By working in the hospital for at least 1 and half years many students get job opportunities and get self-independent. This college provides much help to poor people in terms of treatment, medicine, etc. At least 60 patients daily come to get treatment from this. Many patients stay for 2to 3 months for full treatment. Many patients visit the hospital for Panchkarma therapy which is popular in our college. Many students from our batch get opportunities to work in our college and learn a lot of things. Every kind of branch of Ayurveda such as Kriya, Rachna, ras shastra department, Charak department are available to do. PG courses are also available in Shri Ayurved College.

review_summary.college_name: Shri Ayurved Mahavidyalaya Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: BAMS - Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Our college has good faculty members, but the infrastructure is bad.

content.Placements: In this college, at the time of internships we get local area hospital duties, and many students get opportunities to work in the village. As in internship students get in-half experience by working with many senior doctors, consultants and get knowledge from it. By working in the hospital for at least 1 and half years many students get job opportunities and get self-independent. This college provides much help to poor people in terms of treatment, medicine, etc. At least 60 patients daily come to get treatment from this. Many patients stay for 2to 3 months for full treatment. Many patients visit the hospital for Panchkarma therapy which is popular in our college. Many students from our batch get opportunities to work in our college and learn a lot of things. Every kind of branch of Ayurveda such as Kriya, Rachna, ras shastra department, Charak department are available to do. PG courses are also available in Shri Ayurved College.

description: The Shri Ayurved Mahavidyalaya BAMS Cutoff 2024 has been published for Round 4. reviews_list.batch_info: Diploma in Pharmacy (D.Pharma) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: The college is okayish overall .

review_content.Placements: The percentage of the students getting placed in our college is more than 80% and almost the entire batch gets the opportunity of internship from our college. The average package being offered to us is 5 lacs and the highest is 8 lacs rupees per annum.
review_content.Infrastructure: The facilities and the infrastructure that is provided to us in our course is that we have, we have access to Wi-Fi across the campus, a big library and the hostel facilities provided to us are good, the food quality in the mess is not that great and the canteen is okayish.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: It is the best college for pharmacy.

review_content.Placements: Companies don't visit our college to offer placements but are expected in 2025. They provide the best knowledge. It is a good college in the Amravati district with the best faculty members.
review_content.Infrastructure: All the facilities are available in our college like Wi-Fi. Classrooms are clean with digital board facilities. All the books and newspapers are available in the library. Chemicals and equipment are available in labs. Food items available in the canteen are somasa, tea, and idly sambhar.
review_content.Faculty: Faculty members in our college are supportive and knowledgeable. They help students to prepare for GPAT and NIPER. The course curriculum makes students the best pharmacists. Semester exams are difficult. The pass percentage is 50%. Internal marks are conducted based on the instructions of teachers.

overview_faqs.question: Is it worth to consider P. R. Pote Patil College of Pharmacy as a good Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: P. R. Pote Patil College of Pharmacy is a reputed institute for M.Sc., B.Pharma, D.Pharma, M.Pharma. Students can opt these programs to pursue their career in Science, Medicine & Health Sciences. Institute has trained & experienced faculty who deliver these programs. As per Shiksha verified reviews, P. R. Pote Patil College of Pharmacy has a rating of 3.9 on the basis of reviews by students. Not just this, it has also been rated 4.3 on campuslife, 2.8 on placements, 5 on faculty and 4 on Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: P. R. Pote Patil College of Pharmacy Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: One of the happiest moments happens in the college.

content.Placements: The students having a pointer of more than 7 are getting placements with packages between 3 to 5 LPA in companies like Glenmark, Advantmed, Zim, Nubeno, etc. The various roles offered by companies to students are officer, executive, medical code, marketing representative, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The college is full of greenery, and the college infrastructure is well-equipped. The laboratories have sufficient equipment, and the library has both book sources as well as e-sources. Wi-Fi facility is also available in the library. The sports and games are also available here.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Really good infrastructure and also having good faculty.

content.Placements: No placements are available. You must work hard on your own to earn the degree offered by the university through college and concentrate on study. The college does not offer any type of placement; you must work hard on your own while completing your own internships outside.
content.Infrastructure: The college's infrastructure and facilities are excellent, including well-equipped labs, good classrooms, benches in the classroom with comfortable spaces for sitting, and a library with subject-related books.
content.Faculty: The college's faculty is also very helpful and supportive; they pay close attention to students and hold daily exams; the school is very strict regarding study habits, and every time a student needs assistance, the teachers are there to lend a hand.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Pharmacy (D.Pharma) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: The college is okayish overall .

content.Placements: The percentage of the students getting placed in our college is more than 80% and almost the entire batch gets the opportunity of internship from our college. The average package being offered to us is 5 lacs and the highest is 8 lacs rupees per annum.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities and the infrastructure that is provided to us in our course is that we have, we have access to Wi-Fi across the campus, a big library and the hostel facilities provided to us are good, the food quality in the mess is not that great and the canteen is okayish.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: It is the best college for pharmacy.

content.Placements: Companies don't visit our college to offer placements but are expected in 2025. They provide the best knowledge. It is a good college in the Amravati district with the best faculty members.
content.Infrastructure: All the facilities are available in our college like Wi-Fi. Classrooms are clean with digital board facilities. All the books and newspapers are available in the library. Chemicals and equipment are available in labs. Food items available in the canteen are somasa, tea, and idly sambhar.
content.Faculty: Faculty members in our college are supportive and knowledgeable. They help students to prepare for GPAT and NIPER. The course curriculum makes students the best pharmacists. Semester exams are difficult. The pass percentage is 50%. Internal marks are conducted based on the instructions of teachers.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Pharmacy (D.Pharma) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: It is a very good college.

content.Placements: Around 734 students got placed in this course. Top recruiting companies are Cipla, Sun Pharma, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has a separate library for all departments. Free Wi-Fi is available on our campus. Several books are available in our library. The food served in the canteen is better.
content.Faculty: Teachers are very good. They have at least 10 years of experience in teaching. Few of them have completed their master's degrees. Semester exams are conducted strictly.
content.Other: This course has high demand after the pandemic, so I opted for this course. It also provides immediate jobs after completing this course. I would recommend students to join this college. It is one of the top-ranked colleges.

college_info.intro: Among the courses offered at IPSR Group of Institutions, BPharma and MPharma are particularly popular. At the undergraduate level, the institute offers two BPharma programmes: BPharmacy and BPharma Lateral Entry. Candidates must meet the college's eligibility criteria to enrol in the BPharma courses. The admission process at IPSR Group of Institutions is entrance-based.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: IPSR Group of Institutions provides a variety of courses at both undergraduate and postgraduate levels, including DPharma, BPharma, BPharma (Lateral), MPharma, DElEd (BTC), and a Diploma in Homeopathy. At the undergraduate level, the institution offers two BPharma programs: BPharmacy and BPharma Lateral Entry. IPSR Group of Institutions's admission process is entrance-based. IPSRGI offers MPharma courses at the PG level. A total of 60 seats are available for this course. The duration of the course is four years.

reviews_list.review_title: It is a good college for students.

review_content.Placements: Placements are provided. A few students get placed in their respective fields. The average salary package is 2.5 LPA, and the highest is 4 LPA. Many MNCs like Cipla, Sun Pharma, etc., are coming to our college during placement drives.
review_content.Infrastructure: It has a decent infrastructure. Hostel facilities are available, but the food is below average. Well-equipped laboratories are available. Wi-Fi facilities are available, but not for students. I did not receive the password. A playground is available for students.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely satisfied with education and dissatisfied with campus and Playground.

review_content.Placements: In this course, the placement of students is based on their skills. The lowest package offered is minimum 3,00000 INR and the highest is more than 10,00000 LPA. Sunpharma and Cipla are the top recruiters. These companies also recruit students for internship.
review_content.Infrastructure: There has been not so big campus and also no any type of life enjoyment things. But student who want real education than that thing is available there. Library, labs, Wi-Fi are available. Quality of food in canteen is best in comparison of other colleges. Sports facility is not available there is so small ground. No any medical facility and no any electronic appliances are allowed in hostel like prison.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: The college is the best. The faculty in college is good. College infrastructure is the best.

review_content.Placements: The percentage of students placed in my college is 80–90%. The lowest package offered in the college is INR 5 to 10 lakh, and the highest package is INR 15 to 20 lakh per annum. Companies that come to the college include Pharma Tech and others. This college is the best for pharmacy students.
review_content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure at the college are the best, and the college is in the best location. The mess facilities are good. The teachers are good in college. Teachers are well educated at the college. Hostels are also better. The college medical service is the best. The college conducts an annual function every year. Game and sports periods are held every week.

faqs.answer: Some medical field which offe best work and life balance are shown below -Dentistry (BDS & MDS) – Fixed clinic hours, fewer emergencies.Pharmacy (BPharm & MPharm) – Less stress compared to hospital-based jobs.Physiotherapy (BPT & MPT) – Flexible working hours, minimal emergency calls.Public Health & Community Medicine – Focus on preventive healthcare rather than emergency treatments.Clinical Research & Medical Writing – Research-based work with no direct patient responsibilities.
faqs.question: Q: Which Medical fields offer the best work-life balance?

faqs.answer: The best choice depends on your career aspirations:· If you want to become a teacher: Opt for a B.Ed. It's the mandatory qualification for teaching in most schools.· If you want to pursue a career in research or a science-related field: A BSc would be more suitable. It provides a strong foundation for further studies and specialised careers.· If you're unsure: Consider your interests and skills. Do you enjoy teaching and interacting with students? Or are you more drawn to scientific exploration and research? Additional options:· M.Ed.: If you already have a B.Ed., you can pursue a Master of Education for career advancement or specialisation in a particular teaching area.· Diploma courses: Various specialised Diploma courses in education or related fields can enhance your skills and knowledge.

faqs.question: What are the career options after BPharma from IPSR Group of Institutions?

rows: Pharmacists are healthcare professionals who are experts in the field of medications and pharmaceuticals.
A Drug Inspector is a professional responsible for ensuring compliance with drug laws, regulations, and standards within the pharmaceutical industry.
Quality control (QC) refers to the processes and procedures used to ensure that products or services meet established quality standards and specifications.

Clinical researchers are professionals who conduct research studies and trials involving human participants to investigate the safety and effectiveness of new medical treatments, therapies, drugs, or medical devices.

A hospital pharmacist is a healthcare professional who works within a hospital or medical centre, primarily focusing on the dispensing, management, and provision of medications to patients within the hospital setting.

review_summary.college_name: IPSR Group of Institutions Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: It is a good college for students.

content.Placements: Placements are provided. A few students get placed in their respective fields. The average salary package is 2.5 LPA, and the highest is 4 LPA. Many MNCs like Cipla, Sun Pharma, etc., are coming to our college during placement drives.
content.Infrastructure: It has a decent infrastructure. Hostel facilities are available, but the food is below average. Well-equipped laboratories are available. Wi-Fi facilities are available, but not for students. I did not receive the password. A playground is available for students.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied with education and dissatisfied with campus and Playground.

content.Placements: In this course, the placement of students is based on their skills. The lowest package offered is minimum 3,00000 INR and the highest is more than 10,00000 LPA. Sunpharma and Cipla are the top recruiters. These companies also recruit students for internship.
content.Infrastructure: There has been not so big campus and also no any type of life enjoyment things. But student who want real education than that thing is available there. Library, labs, Wi-Fi are available. Quality of food in canteen is best in comparison of other colleges. Sports facility is not available there is so small ground. No any medical facility and no any electronic appliances are allowed in hostel like prison.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: The college is the best. The faculty in college is good. College infrastructure is the best.

content.Placements: The percentage of students placed in my college is 80–90%. The lowest package offered in the college is INR 5 to 10 lakh, and the highest package is INR 15 to 20 lakh per annum. Companies that come to the college include Pharma Tech and others. This college is the best for pharmacy students.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure at the college are the best, and the college is in the best location. The mess facilities are good. The teachers are good in college. Teachers are well educated at the college. Hostels are also better. The college medical service is the best. The college conducts an annual function every year. Game and sports periods are held every week.

admission_overview.college_name: IPSR Group of Institutions Course Admission 2025: Eligibility, Selection Criteria, Application

admission_process.title: IPSR Group of Institutions Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: IPSR Group of Institutions admissionis open. The institute offers courses, such as DPharma, BPharma, BPharma (Lateral), MPhrama, DElEd (BTC) and Diploma in Homeopathy at the UG and PG level. To get admission to theIPSR Group of Institutions, candidates must meet the eligibility criteria set by the institute. The institute offers five courses in the streams of Medicine and Health Science. The application process at IPSR Group of Institutions is conducted online. Read the following article to know more aboutIPSR Group of Institutionscourse admission2025.

IPSR Group of Institutions admission 2025is based on the entrance exam. The courses are offered throughDr APJ Abdul Kalam Technical Universityexcept for Lateral Entry,Diploma in Pharmacyand DElEd (BTC) courses. Check out the following table for details aroundIPSR Group of Institutionscourse admissions2025:
Particulars
IPSRGI Admission Highlights 2025
Mode of study
Programmes Offered
How to apply?
Level of programmes offered
NOTE:The information available in the above table is sourced from various sources on the internet. Hence, is indicative.

IPSRGI courses' admissions are based on direct/ entrance exam + counselling. The admission will based on the JEECUP AND CUET exam score. However, candidates can also get direct admission. Candidates must also fulfil the minimum eligibility requirements of the respective courses. The following table mentions the eligibility and selection criteria forIPSR Group of Institutions courses:
IPSR Group of Institutions admission process includes registration based on direct/ entrance exam + counselling/JEECUP and CUET. Candidates must follow the below steps to get a seat in IPSRGI:
STEP 1: IPSR Group of Institutions Application Process 2025
Candidates are required to apply online on the official website of the institute.
STEP 2: Selection Rounds
Students will be selected based on direct/ entrance exam + counselling/JEECUP and CUET. Apart from this, candidates also have to complete the last educational qualification set by the institute.
STEP 3: Merit List andAdmission Confirmation
Once selection rounds are over, the institute releases a merit list. To allot and confirm the seat candidates are required to pay the application fee at the admission receipt centre.

faqs.question: Is DPharma available at IPSR Group of Institutions?
faqs.answer: Yes, DPharma course is available at IPSR Group of Institutions. IPSR Group of Institutions offers a two-year DPharma Diploma course. To be eligible for the award of the degree, candidates shall complete the course in a maximum period of two years from the date of enrolment for the first semester of the course. Candidates must pass Class 12 with PCM/PCB to apply for the DPharma course.

faqs.question: How can I get seat in DPharma at IPSR Group of Institutions?
faqs.answer: IPSR Group of Institutions offers seats in the DPharma programme based on JEECUP and CUET entrance exam scores. Candidates must have a valid score of JEECUP and CUET.  To get admission to the IPSR Group of Institutions, candidates must meet the eligibility criteria set by the institute which is Class 12 with PCM/PCB. Shortlisted aspirants further need to pay a course fee to confirm their seat in the institute.

courses_data.description: The institute offers two BPharma courses namelyBPharmacyand BPharma Lateral Entry at the UG level. faqs.question: Can I get direct admission to BPharma at IPSR Group of Institutions?
faqs.answer: Yes, candidates can get direct admission for the BPharma course at IPSR Group of Institutions. For BPharma course admission, candidates must meet the eligibility criteria set by the institute. Aspirants should pass Class 12 with PCB or Maths. The admission criteria for the course are direct/ entrance exam + counselling, JEECUP and CUET.

faqs.question: Is there any entrance exam for admission to BPharma at IPSR Group of Institutions?
faqs.answer: For admission to BPharmacy course at IPSR Group of Institutions, students need to fulfil the minimum eligibility criteria in the first place. The selection criteria for this course are entrance-based + direct/entrance exam + counselling and candidates must pass Class 12 with PCB or Maths. Candidates who have not completed Class 12 are not eligible for admission.

highlights.summary: Here are some additional updates regarding the Baddi University of Emerging Sciences and Technology:

student_insights.feedback: Many students started their own start-ups
Strong alumni network that help with placement opportunities
Very Active and resourceful, college is also involved

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Baddi University of Emerging Sciences and Technology is an institute which offers various courses at UG and PG levels. Students can choose Full Time programmes from streams such as Engineering, Medicine & Health Sciences and Business & Management Studies. At the UG level, students can choose the available programmes such as B.E. / B.Tech, B.Sc. and BCA. Talking about PG level, some of the available courses include M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM and Executive MBA/PGDM. The fee structure for the Baddi University of Emerging Sciences and Technology programmes is around INR 60,000 to 5,60,000.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharm.) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Baddi University is one of the best colleges for all.

review_content.Placements: I college is one of the best colleges for placement. It gives 100% placement for all the students. Recently, one of the pharma companies visited for placement, and more than 30 students got placed in that company (Macloids) with an 18 LPA package. Many more companies will be visiting for recruitment for students, and the best part of our college is its campus, which is so beautiful.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our hostel is one of the better places to stay because it's inside the college campus, and the quality of food is good. There is a gym too for the girls, and the main thing is the security of the hostel, which is very high for students. In our hostel, there is zero ragging, and it gives a home vibe.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharm.) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Overall good and calm campus life.

review_content.Placements: Out of 60 students, 55 students got placed. The lowest average package is 1.5 LPA, and the highest average package is 2.36 LPA. Macleods, Sun Pharma, Cipla, and Torex are the top recruiting companies. Almost everyone got an internship at Sun Pharma and Macleods in Production, QA, and QC.
review_content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are pretty good. Wi-Fi is available, and the library is quiet and good, open all the time for the students. In the hostel, rooms are good, but the food is not up to the mark. Canteen facilities in the college are really good. Medical facilities in the hostel are not good.

overview_faqs.question: What do Electrical Engineering professionals do?
overview_faqs.answer: Electrical Engineering professionals are engineering jack of all trades, as they make use of their knowledge of Physics and Mathematics along with computer programming skills to develop intricate circuit systems. These circuit boards run electrical signals to and from electrical components to accomplish everything from a mundane computer startup to controlling absolute power and precision of a rocket going out of earth's atmosphere.Know more about -Electrical Engineering Courses

review_summary.college_name: Baddi University of Emerging Sciences and Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Please don't waste your time and money in this college.

content.Placements: Placements are very poor. Only 1 and 2 students get placements from the whole batch. The highest package is around 3 LPA - 4 LPA, which is low.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has no paint and a dead building. Our college is not value for money. Building needs maintenance and projectors are broken. Hostels are too expensive and they don't match the value. Courses like BBA and B.Com they treated the same, which is odd because all the subjects and classes are the same in both courses.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Super infrastructure and lackluster student life experience.

content.Placements: In 2023, 23 out of 38 M.Tech students got placed, with a median package of 4.50 LPA. More than 92% of students are placed. More than 90% get internships. Placements are also average. Only some students get higher packages. Most of the students secure a package of 4 - 5 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: There are adequate facilities such as classrooms, libraries, laboratories, sports facilities, medical rooms, sanitation facilities, and computer labs. They are essential for creating a conducive learning environment. A qualified teacher has the right academic qualifications and training to teach effectively.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharm.) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Baddi University is one of the best colleges for all.

content.Placements: I college is one of the best colleges for placement. It gives 100% placement for all the students. Recently, one of the pharma companies visited for placement, and more than 30 students got placed in that company (Macloids) with an 18 LPA package. Many more companies will be visiting for recruitment for students, and the best part of our college is its campus, which is so beautiful.
content.Infrastructure: Our hostel is one of the better places to stay because it's inside the college campus, and the quality of food is good. There is a gym too for the girls, and the main thing is the security of the hostel, which is very high for students. In our hostel, there is zero ragging, and it gives a home vibe.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharm.) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Overall good and calm campus life.

content.Placements: Out of 60 students, 55 students got placed. The lowest average package is 1.5 LPA, and the highest average package is 2.36 LPA. Macleods, Sun Pharma, Cipla, and Torex are the top recruiting companies. Almost everyone got an internship at Sun Pharma and Macleods in Production, QA, and QC.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are pretty good. Wi-Fi is available, and the library is quiet and good, open all the time for the students. In the hostel, rooms are good, but the food is not up to the mark. Canteen facilities in the college are really good. Medical facilities in the hostel are not good.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharm.) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: A real review of our college.

content.Placements: Students with above 75% get placements. The average salary package offered is about 2.5 LPA. Companies required boys for the packaging department. In our course, internships are not on the academic calendar. Placements are available in every course whether it's B.Pharmacy or MBA.
content.Infrastructure: Working laboratories are available in the college. Classrooms are fully managed. Our college also provides us with free Wi-Fi facilities. Food quality is average. A library is also available in our college. A lot of sports activities are available here.

admission_overview.college_name: Baddi University of Emerging Sciences and Technology Admission 2025: Fees, Courses, Eligibility and Selection

admission_process.title: Baddi University of Emerging Sciences and Technology Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Baddi University of Emerging Sciences and Technology admissionis based on both merit or exam scores of the candidates. Besides, Baddi University of Emerging Sciences and Technology considers scores in JEE Main, GATE, and CAT for admission to specific courses.Baddi University of Emerging Sciences and Technologyoffers courses at the UG and PG levels.
The college offers UG programmes for 54 months - 4 years. For programmes at PG level, the duration is 2 years.
The total tuition fee for UG programmes isINR 1,08,000 - 5,60,000. Likewise, the PG programmes fee isINR 60,000 - 4,00,000. Students can pay the fee amount via online or offline mode.
Please note that this fee information is obtained from the official website/ sanctioning body but is subject to change.

reviews.review_heading: Please don't waste your time and money in this college.
reviews.review_text: Our college has no paint and a dead building. Our college is not value for money. Building needs maintenance and projectors are broken. Hostels are too expensive and they don't match the value. Courses like BBA and B.Com they treated the same, which is odd because all the subjects and classes are the same in both courses.

reviews.review_heading: Super infrastructure and lackluster student life experience.
reviews.review_text: There are adequate facilities such as classrooms, libraries, laboratories, sports facilities, medical rooms, sanitation facilities, and computer labs. They are essential for creating a conducive learning environment. A qualified teacher has the right academic qualifications and training to teach effectively.

reviews.review_heading: Baddi University is one of the best colleges for all.
reviews.review_text: Our hostel is one of the better places to stay because it's inside the college campus, and the quality of food is good. There is a gym too for the girls, and the main thing is the security of the hostel, which is very high for students. In our hostel, there is zero ragging, and it gives a home vibe.

reviews.review_heading: Overall good and calm campus life.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are pretty good. Wi-Fi is available, and the library is quiet and good, open all the time for the students. In the hostel, rooms are good, but the food is not up to the mark. Canteen facilities in the college are really good. Medical facilities in the hostel are not good.

reviews.review_heading: A real review of our college.
reviews.review_text: Working laboratories are available in the college. Classrooms are fully managed. Our college also provides us with free Wi-Fi facilities. Food quality is average. A library is also available in our college. A lot of sports activities are available here.

reviews.review_heading: Honest review from 2k24.
reviews.review_text: The School of Pharmacy has the best facilities available in our university. All faculty members have a great command of their own subjects. They help us to clear our concepts. They are very supportive and helpful. Our whole campus has Wi-Fi connections. We have library access all the time. The library has all kinds of books and a cozy reading space. I would like to say that hostel life here could improve. Restrictions on girls should be considered once. Food in the hostel mess is average and nee...

reviews.review_heading: This university has a really good campus.
reviews.review_text: The college also gives students access to every club, and the community here is good. They are well-behaved and educated. Fests at Baddi University are conducted about three times per semester, so students can also enjoy their lives. College also arranges extra fun events throughout the year.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, I had satisfactory facilities at this college.
reviews.review_text: Our college has an average infrastructure for the MBA. The college has good quality facilities in our course. The college has high-speed Wi-Fi, labs, library, classrooms, canteen, etc., in their campus for its students. The college also has its own hostel for the students. Hostel facilities were also good like the college.

reviews.review_heading: M.Tech at Baddi University Of Emerging Sciences & Technology.
reviews.review_text: The Infrastructure is spread across a vast area. The University covers acres of land and have many departmental buildings. For the Pharmacy course, for the engineering courses, for the Science courses and for the MBA. Also they have 4-5 Hostels within the Campus. Our Hostels are equipped with Wi-Fi so that we can study unlimited. The classrooms are equipped with projectors and they have large auditoriums for organizing Indoor events and large grounds for sports events. They have got many Univers...

reviews.review_heading: It is a good university in all aspects. If you need a degree, do not bother about placements.
reviews.review_text: The campus was Wi-Fi enabled, but it was not working on top floors. Classrooms were good. The library needs to be a little updated as all books were outdated. The hostel life was somewhat struggling between 4 walls. The food served in the mess was not good. The hostel staff used to pass personal comments.

reviews.review_heading: I'm dissatisfied with bad quality of education and less placements.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure of our college were good. Wi-Fi was available on campus. Classrooms were good. Computers in the labs were old and don't work. It was difficult to install a simple program on those computers. The library was good with all the books and study materials. Our college supported students for NPTEL certifications.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Baddi University.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi speed was 2G bandwidth. Classrooms are like store rooms with no paint on walls and look like a cemetery. There is no cleanliness maintained until there's a complaint filed. Sweepers show their attitude while cleaning the room as if we intentionally made it dirty.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college, and placements are also good.
reviews.review_text: In this college, Wi-Fi was enabled. The classes were updated and students get Wi-Fi on campus as well. The infrastructure was good, and it provides 25 acres of land.

reviews.review_heading: BUEST is the best with you in it.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is too good. There are venture labs for practical-based knowledge. The classrooms are well furnished and the library has every book related to management studies. BUEST gets 5 stars in every area. It is highly recommended and everyone can join BUEST.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with placements, infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Our college has good infrastructure with Wi-Fi facilities. Computer labs and smart classrooms are available. Hostel facilities are good with the best quality food, sports facilities, medical facilities and a canteen within the campus.

college_info.intro:
MUIT Noida offers BTech, BSc and BCA as its popular programmes. It offers BTech in specialisations such as CSE, CSE with Data Science, CSE with Animation and CSE with Cyber Security for 4 years. The School of Science and Humanities offers BSc, while the School of Science of Consciousness offers programmes such as BSc and BSc (Hons) in Maharishi Ayurveda Diet. MUIT also offers BCA, BCA (Hons) and BCA with AI/ML. Maharishi University Noida BCA fees is around INR 2.25 Lakh - 3 Lakh.
Apart from this, Maharishi University of Information Technology provides UG, PG and Doctoral programmes in various streams such as Science, Commerce, Management, Humanities, Pharmacy, Engineering, Animation, Journalism and Mass Communication, Law, and Enrichment Courses. Some of the courses include MBA, BTech, LLM, BSc, BCA, BBA LLB, BCom, MA, MCom, MCA, etc. Candidates can check out the details regarding Maharishi University of Information Technology popular programmes:

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science & Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: You get what you pay. College is not like "SOTY" but it's gives you a proper college experience.

content.Placements: Placement is good, but you can't completely rely on them as not all good companies come to visit. Even though the placement is high, the packages are average. If you need a good job, you need to network outside the college. In campus placement should be the backup option.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is what you pay for. All the equipment is well-maintained and meets all the proper requirements. We have a huge ground and multiple courts like badminton court, basketball court, volleyball court, table tennis, carrom, chess, etc. Overall, it is good.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: It is a great learning experience with good placement.

content.Placements: My college offered placements for at least 60-70 percent of students. The highest package was 9-10 LPA. The lowest package was 3-4 LPA. The average package was 6-7 LPA. Some top recruiters for our course included TCS, Infosys, Wipro, Accenture, Capgemini, and Tech Mahindra. These companies roles in software development, testing, consulting, and IT services.
content.Infrastructure: Our department had smart classrooms, computer labs, high-speed Wi-Fi, and a library with both books and digital resources. We also had seminar halls and study areas. It supported academic and practical learning. Medical, sports, and games facilities were also included.

content.Infrastructure: BCA department features smart classrooms, modern labs and extensive digital resources. Hostel offers Wi-Fi, furnished rooms and hygienic food. Medical care and sports facilities are available to enhance students' academic and overall success.

admission_overview.college_name: Maharishi University of Information Technology Noida Admission 2025: Eligibility, Admission Process and Scholarships

admission_process.title: Maharishi University of Information Technology Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Maharishi University of Information Technology, Noida has been recognised by the UGC and AICTE. The university offers various UG and PG programmes in various streams such as Data Science, Animation, Law, Consciousness and Journalism and mass Communication. The duration of all these programmes is between one and five years. The application form for MUIT can be submitted either at the Admission cell, Noida campus or through the website. Direct admission will be offered based on your JEE score/ CUET score/ CLAT score or if you score 90% in class 12 from a recognized board.

Maharishi University of Information Technology Noida campus offers UG, PG and doctorate-level programmes under the School of Law, Animation, Data Science and Journalism & Mass Communication. The duration of all these programmes is between one and five years. Find below the MUIT Noida courses, along with eligibility and selection:
JEE, CUET, MUIT Entrance exam

The university offers admission both based on entrance and merit in the last qualifying exam. Candidates have to get through all the selection rounds of the respective course to get a seat. The admission process involves application form filling, an entrance exam followed by counselling, merit list release and final admission. Find below the steps for more understanding:

Application Process:The application form for admission is available at www.muitnoida.edu.in. You need to fill in all the required details in the application form to complete the process of your application.

Application Fees:The application fee for admission is INR 200. You can make the payment online or by cash at MUIT Noida Accounts office or MUIT Noida Admission Cell. You can also pay by Cheque/DD in favour of 'Maharishi University of Information Technology'. Your application form will be considered only after successful payment of the application fee.

Selection Process - JEE Score | CUET Score | CLAT Score | MUIT Entrance Exam:If you meet the eligibility criteria, you will be contacted by the MUIT counsellor for the entrance exam. You will need to appear for the exam as per the schedule provided by the University. After the exam, applicants who clear the exam will receive an email from the MUIT counsellor. Direct admission will be offered based on your JEE score/ CUET score/ CLAT score or if you score 90% in class 12 from a recognized board.

Admission Confirmation:Your admission will be confirmed only on the availability of the seat and deposition of 50% of the semester fee. Once your admission is confirmed, you will receive the Admission letter from MUIT.

In total, a candidate might have to spend a minimum of INR 40,000 to a maximum of INR 6 Lacs on the total tuition fees. sports.description: Available Facilities: Cricket Ground, Football Ground, Table Tennis

reviews.review_heading: You get what you pay. College is not like "SOTY" but it's gives you a proper college experience.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is what you pay for. All the equipment is well-maintained and meets all the proper requirements. We have a huge ground and multiple courts like badminton court, basketball court, volleyball court, table tennis, carrom, chess, etc. Overall, it is good.

reviews.review_heading: It is a great learning experience with good placement.
reviews.review_text: Our department had smart classrooms, computer labs, high-speed Wi-Fi, and a library with both books and digital resources. We also had seminar halls and study areas. It supported academic and practical learning. Medical, sports, and games facilities were also included.

reviews.review_heading: A decent infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: BCA department features smart classrooms, modern labs and extensive digital resources. Hostel offers Wi-Fi, furnished rooms and hygienic food. Medical care and sports facilities are available to enhance students' academic and overall success.

reviews.review_heading: Strong academics at MUIT.
reviews.review_text: The BCA course at MUIT is supported with modern infrastructure and facilities that enhance students' learning. The department has well-equipped computer labs, Wi-Fi-enabled smart classrooms, a library, and seminar halls for workshops and guest lectures.

reviews.review_heading: About curriculum, placements, infrastructure, and student experience.
reviews.review_text: MUIT Noida campus is spread across approximately 350 acres, featuring a botanical garden, lush lawns, and well-planned internal roads within a serene, pollution-free environment. We have smart classrooms. It has spacious, air-conditioned rooms equipped with projectors, microphones, digital boards, and Wi-Fi connectivity.

reviews.review_heading: MUIT Noida offers solid academics and infrastructure for BCA students.
reviews.review_text: MUIT Noida delivered a comprehensive infrastructure framework covering academic, recreational, residential, and wellness needs. The campus boasts modern classrooms, robust lab setup, mindfulness space, and strong support facilities like hostels, food services, gym, and healthcare. While most students appreciate the quality and functionality of these facilities, especially for academics. Some believe there was room for enhancement in campus life and sporting infrastructure.

reviews.review_heading: Supportive faculty, vibrant campus life, but placements and industry exposure need improvement.
reviews.review_text: Hostel facilities are decent with clear rooms and basic amenities like Wi-Fi, water coolers, and common study areas. Mess food is best like hotel food, sometimes repetitive but hygienic. Canteen offers better taste and variety. Medical facilities are very best.

reviews.review_heading: It's a great place for great education.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is too good, best, and no word to express. Also sports complex is next level. Every type of thing is present. Hostel is too good, clean, and ragging-free. Mess food is too tasty and hygienic. Staff is too good. Everything is best all over.

reviews.review_heading: Supportive faculty, vibrant campus life, but placements and industry exposure need improvement.
reviews.review_text: Hostel facilities are decent with clean rooms and basic amenities like Wi-Fi, water coolers, and common study areas. Mess food is the best, like hotel food, sometimes repetitive but hygienic. Canteen offers better taste and variety. Medical facilities are very good.

reviews.review_heading: Best place and best college ever.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is next level, premium, or port class and advanced class. Also, the hostel is good, clean, and ragging-free because the college security and management are good. Mess is clean and food is too tasty and hygienic. Also, the staff is too good. Park and sports complex are very well.

reviews.review_heading: College is bad in terms of placement, infrastructure is good and huge but teaching style is bad.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is pretty good in comparison to other colleges, AC in every class and labs, computers are working, and even hostel is clean with good food. They have a cricket ground, a football ground, and a basketball court too. Apart from this, there is a small field for volleyball and badminton.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Maharishi University of Information Technology - Noida Campus.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of my college is excellent and very nice. Hostels are also very clean and very peaceful. Mess is also very clean and hygienic. Libraries are offered with air-conditioned rooms and also provide many books. Each type of book is present in the library. Free Wi-Fi connection, fast internet connection, etc., make the college infrastructure five-star.

reviews.review_heading: Please check out our college. Best college to visit is our college. Thank you.
reviews.review_text: Our college facilities are good. Big playing grounds like cricket ground, football ground, a big canteen, a big library, clean washrooms, and a good environment are available. Hostel has good facilities. Our hostel does not allow non-veg. Overall, good college facilities are provided by our college.

reviews.review_heading: I am very satisfied with my college.
reviews.review_text: Wi -Fi is available in the whole college for students as well as for teachers. There are air conditioned libraries, classrooms, and laptops are also provided by the college in libraries for doing coding. Hostel is very clean, and the mess is also very hygienic.

reviews.review_heading: I am very satisfied with my college.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructures are very good. The environment is also very good. Libraries are air-conditioned and have all available facilities. College has cleanliness. Mess is very much hygienic. Hostels are also well managed, and the staff is also very good.

college_info.college_name: Maharishi University of Information Technology Noida Scholarship Details

paragraphs: The application fee is INR 200 to be paid either in cash or DD or online transaction. There is no refund for the application fee. Your application form will be considered only after payment of application fee. Candidates can get the application form on official website of MUIT Noida.

For Online• Go to the university's website and click on the "Apply Now" button.• Complete the application form with the correct information.• Upload the required documents and pay the application fee.• Submit the application form.

For Offline• Either collect the application form in person or download it from the website.• Complete the application form with the correct information.• Attach the required documents and pay the application fee.• Submit the form in person or by post.

MUIT Noida provides relaxation through scholarships to meritorious students and students who actively participate in extracurricular activities. It also takes sports, performing arts and literary skills into consideration as the eligibility criteria for scholarship. The University also offers merit-cum-means based scholarships for students from other categories. The Scholarships are also awarded based on the rank or score of entrance exams or aptitude tests.

The Maharishi University Noida offers BPharma through the School of Pharmaceutical Sciences which was established in 2022. The University offers BPharma for 4 years with the eligibility criteria of achieving 35%-50% after 10+2 and after the qualification of the accepted exams as per the University. The total tuition fee of this programme is around INR 4.8 Lacs for a full-time mode of study.

Maharishi University Noida fee structure varies with the difference in the duration of the course and the level of the program. Offering courses in UG, PG and Diploma levels with a minimum span of 1 year and a maximum of 5 years, the University offers a decent fee structure of a minimum INR 40,000 as a total tuition fee. The highest total tuition fee is around INR 6 Lacs which is of BTech. Apart from the tuition fees, the fee structure includes various other recurring expenses and one-time fees that a candidate must take into consideration.

BAMS stands for Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery. It is an undergraduate degree programme designed to make students familiar with the concepts of Ayurveda and use them for the treatment of patients. The exam required for BAMS is NEET with 50% score in 10+2. Around 89% of students got placement. review_summary.college_name: UHSR Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Aeronautical Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: It is the best college for engineering.

content.Placements: I am part of the 2023-24 batch of this course. About 70-80 percent of students get placed. The package offered ranges from 3-8 LPA. The average package offered is 4.5 LPA. Top recruiters include reputed industry companies. 70 percent of students got internships in well-known organisations.
content.Infrastructure: The department has well-equipped labs, smart classrooms, a good library, and a Wi-Fi campus. The hostel facilities are clean and comfortable. Mess and canteen food are decent. Basic medical care, sports grounds, and indoor games are also available for students.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Good college with good knowledge.

content.Placements: Almost 95 out of 100 students were placed in my course and others moved to further studies. The highest package in my course was 20 LPA and the lowest package was 24 LPA. Top recruiting companies in my course are TCS, Infosys, HCL, etc. Almost 90 out of 100 students got internships in my course. Software engineer, tester, etc. roles were offered in my course.
content.Infrastructure: Good facilities are available in Puran Murti campus and very good infrastructure is available for my course. Best computer labs for coding. Best computers with good processing speed. All books are available in the library. Good facilities are available in the hostel. Daily new variety of food is available. I like that.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Computer Applications (MCA) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: NIMCET scores are compulsory to join MCA.

content.Placements: College with multiple plans to create opportunities by tempting the drives conducted by different types of companies with various packages. The top professional corporates like TCS and Accenture are the primary companies that offer recruitment for MCA candidates at 5 to 8 percent, other companies offer 40 to 45 percent placement with an average package.
content.Infrastructure: For the kind information, as the college occupies an acre of space, all the facilities are found within the campus.

individual_reviews.course: BCA (Hons.) Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning in collaboration with Samatrix.io - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Good experience at Geeta University!

content.Placements: Placements are good here at Geeta University. Almost all eligible students get placed. The highest package of GU is 40 LPA, with an average package of Rs. 6,00,000. They provide internships from the 2nd year itself. As I am doing BCA AIML, which has a good scope.
content.Infrastructure: As a BCA AIML student, I can say that the course & curriculum are good here & it is running with advanced technologies. They have Geeta Technical Hub, which not only provides hands-on experience but also makes us industry-ready as they are associated with companies like AWS, CISCO, REDHAT, etc.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) (Hons.) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: I am enjoying the vibrant atmosphere at Geeta University.

content.Placements: The number of placements was decent in my course. At least 80–90 percent got placements, and others opted for higher studies or went abroad to pursue their career in higher studies. Top recruiting companies that came to the campus included Wipro, TCS, HTL Ltd., and many more.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure and amenities provided at the campus were much better than what I observed in other institutes. Rather than just providing the best services, they maintained hygiene on the campus, in the mess, and in the classrooms as well. Here, I found the campus catered to services.

admission_overview.college_name: UHSR Admission 2025: Courses, Fee, Application & Selection

paragraphs: UHSR admissions 2025are primarily entrance-based. The university considers NEET UG, NEET MDS, NEET PG and other entrance exam scores for admission to specific courses.UHSRalso conduct CET or Common Entrance Test for some of the BSc, MSc and MPT programmes. Pt. BD University offers courses at UG, PG and doctoral levels in the fields of Medicine, Nursing, Physiotherapy, Allied Health Sciences, etc., through affiliated colleges. Interested candidates can apply online forUHSR admissions.

Pandit Bhagwat Dayal Sharma University of Health Sciences offers 75 courses in full-time mode. Candidates can apply for the course of their choice via online mode. Below are the keyUHSR admissionhighlights:
Particulars
UHSR Admission Highlights 2025
Mode of study
Programmes Offered
Admission status 2025
Ongoing:UG, PG & Doctoral
UG courses:INR 8,000 - INR 68.7 lakh
PG courses:INR 20,000 - INR 25 lakh
How to apply?
https://www.uhsr.ac.in/
Level of programmes offered
Popular Programmes

Candidates wishing to apply for a course need to fulfil Pandit Bhagwat Dayal Sharma University of Health Sciences eligibility criteria. The selection for most of the programmes is based on national-level entrance exam scores. The basic eligibility for UG courses is Class 12 whereas graduation is required for PG programmes. Below are popularUHSR coursesalong with their eligibility and selection criteria:
BPT from a recognised institute
She/ he should have completed 6 months internship at or before the time of counselling
Check out otherUHSR Courses

Pandit Bhagwat Dayal Sharma University of Health Sciences fee varies course-wise. The total fee of UHSR is a sum of tuition fees, security deposit, hostel fees, mess fees, etc. Candidates shall be able to pay the fee annually or semester-wise. Below are top UHSR courses along with their fee and average package:
Note:This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

The university specifies the intake capacity for all the offered courses. Candidates are offered seat based on their entrance exam scores. Aspirants need to pay the course fee to confirm their seat in the university. Below is theUHSR seat intakefor popular courses:
Note:This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

Pandit Bhagwat Dayal Sharma University of Health Sciences reserves some seats for reserved category candidates. Out of the total intake, 50% of the seats are filled under State Quota seats. Remaining 50% of seats are filled under the Management Category. The university reserves 5% of State Quota seats for Persons with Benchmark Disabilities.

Pandit Bhagwat Dayal Sharma University of Health Sciences admission processbegins with registration for the preferred course. Candidates taking admission via the entrance exam must first fill out the application form for the respective exam. Below are the steps to get admission in UHSR:
STEP 1: UHSR Application Process 2025

Candidates can download the application form from the official website of the university. They can also get the prospectus and the application form from the Controller of Finance, Pt BD Sharma UHS, Rohtak.
STEP 2: Selection

Pandit Bhagwat Dayal Sharma University of Health Sciences selects candidates for admission based on their entrance exam scores. The university considers NEET UG scores for MBBS and BDS programme. UHSR also conduct a Common Entrance Test or CET for BSc, MSc, BPT, MPT and other courses. The university also accepts entrance exams such asNEET PG,NEET SS,GPAT, etc. for admission to specific courses.
STEP 3: Merit List

Once the selection process is over, UHSR releases a merit list to announce the names of the selected candidates. The merit list is released round-wise. Candidates with their names need to participate in the counselling round.
STEP 4: Counselling and Seat Allotment

MBBS students are allotted seat through Haryana NEET Counselling. HSTES conducts counselling for MPT, BPharm and other courses. Candidates are required to come with the specified documents for verification. Aspirants who have been allotted a seat need to pay theUHSR feeto confirm their admission.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility for MPT at UHSR?
faqs.answer: Candidates must complete BPT from any recognised college of Physiotherapy to apply for MPT. Candidates should also have completed 6 months internship at or before the time of counselling for MPT programme.Aspirants should also be registered or must have applied for registration with the Haryana State Council for Physiotherapy at the time of counselling (Documentary proof regarding the same has to be produced at the time of counselling).

faqs.question: Can I get admission to Pandit Bhagwat Dayal Sharma University of Health Sciences with 60% in Class 12?
faqs.answer: Candidates need to complete a minimum of Class 12 to apply for Pandit Bhagwat Dayal Sharma University of Health Sciences UG courses. The minimum aggregate ranges between 45% and 50%. There is relaxation in aggregate for reserved category candidates. Hence, aspirants with 60% aggregate can get admission provided they also fulfil the selection requirements. Candidates will need to qualify the entrance exam accepted for the applied course.

faqs.question: What is the admission process for UHSR?
faqs.answer: Candidates are first required to fill out the application form for Pandit Bhagwat Dayal Sharma University of Health Sciences.  The university considers NEET UG scores for MBBS and BDS programme. Besides, UHSR also conduct a Common Entrance Test or CET for BSc, MSc, BPT, MPT and other courses. The university also accepts entrance exams such as NEET PG, NEET SS, GPAT, etc. for admission to specific courses.

faqs.question: Can I join Pandit Bhagwat Dayal Sharma University of Health Sciences without NEET?
faqs.answer: Candidates needNEETscore only to get admission in MBBS and BDS programmes of Pandit Bhagwat Dayal Sharma University of Health Sciences. For all other programmes, different entrance exams are required. NEET MDS is required for admission to MDS programme. The university considers NEET PG score for admission to MD and MS courses. Besides, Pandit Bhagwat Dayal Sharma University of Health Sciences conducts CET for admission to some of the UG and PG courses.

faqs.question: How much rank should I score to get PGIMS Rohtak?
faqs.answer: PGIMS Rohtak NEET UG cutoff 2025was released for various categories under the All India quota for MBBS course admission.For the General AI quota, the overall cutoff ranged from3756to358216for admission to various affiliated colleges. Hence, students need t secure at least358216rank to avail admission.

faqs.question: How are BAMS placements at Pandit Bhagwat Dayal Sharma University of Health Sciences?
faqs.answer: Pandit Bhagwat Dayal Sharma University of Health Sciences was established in the year 2008. It is a NAAC 'A' grade state-level University. BAMS stands for Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery. It is an undergraduate degree programme designed to make students familiar with the concepts of Ayurveda and use them for the treatment of patients. The exam required for BAMS is NEET with 50% score in 10+2. Around 89% of students got placement. The highest salary package offered is 8 LPA, the average salary package offered is around 5 to 6 LPA, and the lowest salary package offered is 3.50 LPA. For any further information you can visit the college website or directly reach out to the college for the same.

review_content.Placements: The placement is not provided in college as most students pursue post graduation after the MBBS course. answer.text: Some medical field which offe best work and life balance are shown below -Dentistry (BDS & MDS) – Fixed clinic hours, fewer emergencies.Pharmacy (BPharm & MPharm) – Less stress compared to hospital-based jobs.Physiotherapy (BPT & MPT) – Flexible working hours, minimal emergency calls.Public Health & Community Medicine – Focus on preventive healthcare rather than emergency treatments.Clinical Research & Medical Writing – Research-based work with no direct patient responsibilities.

lists: Dentistry (BDS & MDS) – Fixed clinic hours, fewer emergencies.
Pharmacy (BPharm & MPharm) – Less stress compared to hospital-based jobs.
Physiotherapy (BPT & MPT) – Flexible working hours, minimal emergency calls.
Public Health & Community Medicine – Focus on preventive healthcare rather than emergency treatments.
Clinical Research & Medical Writing – Research-based work with no direct patient responsibilities.

individual_reviews.title: Bhaskar medical college overview.

content.Placements: The placement is not provided in college as most students pursue post graduation after the MBBS course. But MBBS graduates can easily find job at 35000 to 50000 per month in Hyderabad City. Internship is mandatory for the students in the college which is paid for 2000 per month.
content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure is good with building for each proof year along with a big Library which is equipped with the latest books. The hostel has Wi-Fi and AC facilities. The lecture hall is very good and well maintained with cleaning done timely. The mess is average in the college.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: Teachers are qualified, experienced and you can learn a lot from them.

content.Placements: We have 150 students in each batch. Internship will be for all students in the same hospital for which they pay 2,000 per month. 70-80 percent got an internship. Internship can be done outside the hospital as well while doing internship you can work out as duty doctors.
content.Infrastructure: College has library, sports room, reading room, seminar halls, e-library. College has various departments and labs which are functional, there is also hostel facility available, the mess is not that good but is affordable. Nearby the college you have many food centres, classrooms are well furnished.

reviews_list.batch_info: Doctor of Pharmacy (Pharm.D.) - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: It is a very good college with really good infrastructure and facilities.

review_content.Placements: At least 30% of students get job offer letters during campus placements. Packages are even good for freshers. Many students opt for industrial purposes rather than hospitals. Overall, it is a very good college in giving better careers to the students.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities in the hostel are very good comparatively. Food is hygienic, and all rooms are cleaned every day. The warden takes care of students. Safety in the hostel is of next level. I would recommend this hostel rather than being in a PG because of its security and food hygiene.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely love the college including the garden, library and the faculty, every thing is superb.

review_content.Placements: Present. Now I am studying 3rd year. When I am in 2nd year. Nearly 5 companies are come to select the freshers in my college maximum of our super seniors get the job. Salary wise companies were entered into college. Top salary company entered 1st. Salary per month may be 28k.
review_content.Infrastructure: In Tirupati, my college is the best. It’s good only for the pharmacy department and not for other courses like MPC or BIPC. It’s good only for the students of pharmacy courses like B.Pharma, Pharma.D and PG courses. Wi-Fi facilities are provided. Labs are very clean and are separate for every department. The classrooms have good ventilation. There is a Library with perfect knowledgeable books available. The quotes on the library walls give it a very pleasant look.

content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are spacious. Hostel has good infrastructure. The food in the mess is good when compared to other hostels. There is a very good library in our college. Many departments and placement cells are present in Sri Padmavathi School Of Pharmacy.

individual_reviews.course: Doctor of Pharmacy (Pharm.D.) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: It is a very good college with really good infrastructure and facilities.

content.Placements: At least 30% of students get job offer letters during campus placements. Packages are even good for freshers. Many students opt for industrial purposes rather than hospitals. Overall, it is a very good college in giving better careers to the students.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities in the hostel are very good comparatively. Food is hygienic, and all rooms are cleaned every day. The warden takes care of students. Safety in the hostel is of next level. I would recommend this hostel rather than being in a PG because of its security and food hygiene.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely love the college including the garden, library and the faculty, every thing is superb.

content.Placements: Present. Now I am studying 3rd year. When I am in 2nd year. Nearly 5 companies are come to select the freshers in my college maximum of our super seniors get the job. Salary wise companies were entered into college. Top salary company entered 1st. Salary per month may be 28k.
content.Infrastructure: In Tirupati, my college is the best. It’s good only for the pharmacy department and not for other courses like MPC or BIPC. It’s good only for the students of pharmacy courses like B.Pharma, Pharma.D and PG courses. Wi-Fi facilities are provided. Labs are very clean and are separate for every department. The classrooms have good ventilation. There is a Library with perfect knowledgeable books available. The quotes on the library walls give it a very pleasant look.

individual_reviews.course: Doctor of Pharmacy (Pharm.D.) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: I'm so proud of this college.

content.Placements: Students were placed in my course. 30 seats were there for Pharma.D. 10 seats for Pharma.D. The highest package is 2,40000, lowest is 95000and the average package is 60000. Ruia hospital is thee recruiting company. College doesn't provide internship and they will give 1yr mandatory internship. Specialist in pharmacology pharmacy practice and pharmaceutical analysis are the top roles offered. .
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi connection is good according to the signals. Labs are so good 3hr practice in lab every day is given. Library facilities are provided twice a week, but we can attend everyday based on our interest, library time is 9.45 AM To 5.30 PM. Food compared with outside hostel in mess is good. Don't have expectations on sports and games.

college_info.intro:
Hindusthan College of Arts and Science's popular programmes are BSc and MBA. HICAS Coimbatore students are placed in top companies such as Zoho Corporation, Ramco Cement Ltd, Digital Intelligence Systems, and others. The college aims to provide world-class Management-related education to the students. MBA students can become Management Trainee, Sales Representatives, or can take up various job opportunities relevant to their field.
Hindusthan College of Arts and Science is ranked among the top Management institutes in India. Candidates can check the popular programmes offered at Hindusthan College of Arts and Science in the table provided below:

At the UG level, the college offers BSc, BCA, and other courses to students. At the PG level, the college offers MBA, MCA, and other courses to students.
