faqs.answer: A:    Hindustan College of Arts and Science offers three years BSc programme across multiple specialisations. BSc admission is entirely merit based as per the eligibility criteria set by the college admission body. Find below the BSc eligibility criteria:Any candidate who has completed Class 12 of the Tamilnadu Higher Secondary Board Examinations/ CBSE/ or equivalentPrivate candidates under open schooling systemHigher Secondary or equivalent examinations conducted by all other state boardsPreference is given to candidates who passed in the first attemptBSc SpecialisationsBiotechnologyComputer ScienceElectronics & Communication ScienceElectronic MediaMathematicsMicrobiologyVisual CommunicationPsychology
faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for BSc at Hindustan College of Arts and Science?

faqs.answer: A:    Regarded for its extensive offers in terms of facilities, faculty caliber, and career placement, Hindustan College of Arts and Science in Chennai seems to be well-regarded. It shows good industry ties with an approximate 85% placement rate and alluring packages from leading recruiters like Infosys, TCS, and Wipro. Well-stocked labs, spotless classrooms, and helpful faculty are all present on campus. Though personal preferences may differ, the college stands out among the other options in Chennai's educational scene for students because of its dedication to academic quality, real-world experience, and holistic growth.
faqs.question: Is Hindustan College of Arts and Science best in Chennai?

faqs.answer: A:    No, there is no entrance exam required for admission to BCA course at Hindusthan College of Arts and Science. Candidates willing to get admission to this course can get direct admission based on their Class 12 merit scores. Further, the college prepares merit list based on the past academic records of candidates along with scrutinizing their applications.
faqs.question: Is there any entrance exam for BCA at Hindusthan College of Arts and Science?

faqs.answer: A:    HICAS BCom seat allotment is based on marks secured by candidates in the Class 12 examination. HICAS BCom seat intake varies between 60 and 180 depending upon the specialisation selected by candidates. review_summary.college_name: Hindusthan College of Arts and Science Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Data Science and Analytics - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Great place for education and enjoyment.

content.Placements: Above 60% of students got placed. My senior placed with the highest package of 4.5 LPA (Accenture) but it is not really the highest package. The lowest package is 1.8 LPA. Top companies are Accenture, Zoho, Cognizant, Infosys, etc. Top roles offered are data scientist, data analyst, statistician, data visualiser, and so on.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi, labs, library, and classrooms are awesome with great facilities and also with many advanced software programs used in this course. Hostel food is not really always good but canteen food is good. It is a college that supports much in extra-curricular activities like sports and cultural events.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Overall, it is the best college for the MBA course.

content.Placements: Our college is quite unique and serene. Due to its ease of use and quality, 77% of students are enrolled in this course. In our college, the lowest package is 6 LPA, and the highest package is 22 LPA. Numerous firms, like Deloitte, TCS, Wipro, and others recruit students from our course, providing the greatest and most convenient placements. 75% of our college graduates are hired by corporations. The top positions available for students are HR, manager, and software developer.
content.Infrastructure: The college offered digital learning, projector-based learning, a digital library, Wi-Fi in the library, and charging ports. Although there is no hostel, the food served in the restaurant is always fresh and interesting. Additionally, there is a medical aid box and a medical room. The bathroom is clean and hygienic. The college also has special facilities for athletics and sports.

individual_reviews.course: B.A. in English Literature - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: It is a good college, etc.

content.Placements: My college placements are 80%. Package about 5k to 20k. Top recruiting companies from our college are Zoho, edutech, HireMe, TCS, etc. Percentage of students who got an internship from our course is 80%. Top roles offered in our course are BPO typewriter, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure at our college is good, with good facilities. There are many departments available in our college. The quality of the facilities in our hostel, the quality of food available in the mess and canteen, and medical facilities are good enough.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Mathematics - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Review of Hindusthan College of Arts and Science [HICAS]

content.Placements: 89% of the marks were placed in my course. A minimum of 10,000 to 200,000 was offered in my course. L&T company and Infosys company offer placements to my college. 50% of people got internships from my course in Infosys. Jobs are available in IT companies and trading companies.
content.Faculty: My classroom has fast Wi-Fi and NEET halls with AC. The hostel has rooms with an attached bathroom and also has common bathrooms. Every night, our hostel has a doctor's meeting with medicine. The mess has 100 fans. Sports are studied without fees and studied in the same college.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Strong foundation, practical skills, bright career prospects, and so many events.

content.Placements: More than 10% of the students got placed. The highest package was 7 LPA to 10 LPA. The lowest salary was 4.5 LPA to 7 LPA. Recruiting companies were Zoho, Infosys, HP, Tech Mahindra, Wipro, and LTI. More than 30% of students got internships. Roles offered were software developer, web developer, data scientist, cyber security expert, AI/ML engineer, and full stack developer.
content.Infrastructure: Well, the labs and classrooms were not so good at the same time. The labs were average and the system was okay. Few of the systems may not be in working condition. The Wi-Fi connection was also average, not good. There were a lot of canteens available in this college. The price range was also valued for the product. The food was good but hostel food was the worst. This college had own hospital with the same name as the college so don't worry about medical facilities. In sports, they give importance and scholarships to the students.

admission_process.title: Hindusthan College of Arts and Science Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: HICAS admission process 2025is both merit-based and entrance-based. HICAS accepts admission on the basis ofentrance testfor specific courses such asMBA, MCA, and PhD. Whereas for remaining courses, direct admission is offered based on the merit of the last qualifying exam of candidates. HICAS application forms can be filled in bothonlineandofflinemodes.
Hindusthan College of Arts and Scienceis affiliated withBharathiar University, Coimbatore. Read the complete article to know more about Hindusthan College of Arts and Science admission.

The institute offers admission to over57 coursesat UG, PG, and PhD levels across various streams, such asArts & Humanities, ScienceandAccounting, and Commerce. Apart from this, HICAS also offers 5 diploma and certificate courses. Check below the course-wise eligibility and selection criteria forHICAS courses:
GATE/UGC NET/CSIR NET
Read More:HICAS Admission PolicyandHICAS Admission Brochure 2025

Hindusthan College of Arts and Science admission consists of multiple steps. HICAS admission begins with an online/ offline registration process. Interested students can check out the following section to learn more about Hindusthan College of Arts and Science admission in detail:
HICAS Application Process

HICAS accepts both online/ offline applications for admission to UG & PG courses. Candidates must fill an application form either on the university's official website or they can submit a hard copy of the application form to HICAS.

For PhD course admission, candidates must apply offline. The candidates who want to apply for M. Phil/ PhD programme are advised to visit the official university website. Candidates can download the application from the website. The candidates have to download two copies of the application and submit the filled in application at college.
HICAS Selection Rounds
For MBA & MCA course, students are admitted based on TANCET scores. Whereas for other UG & PG courses, candidates are selected based on their merit of the last qualifying exam.
HICAS Merit List Release & Fee Payment

Hindusthan College of Arts and Science admission is subjected to the rules of reservation of the Government of Tamil Nadu andBharathiar University, Coimbatore. A partial 50% of the seats are filled as per the reservation policy stipulated by the regulatory bodies and 50% of the seats are filled through Management Quota. The shortlisted candidates will be notified through merit lists. Shortlisted aspirants need to come for document verification and pay theHindusthan College of Arts and Science feeto confirm their seats in the university.
For more information aboutHICAS admissioncheck out the below video:

faqs.question: What entrance exam scores does Hindustan College of Arts and Science accept for admission to BSc?
faqs.answer: For admission to Hindustan College of Arts and Science, applicants should pass Class 12 with PCM as the Main Subjects or a High School Senior Secondary exam by the Central Board of Secondary Education (CBSE) of India or any of the equivalent exams conducted by any State Board. The applicants should have secured a minimum 45% aggregate with English as a mandatory subject of the course. A relaxation of 5% of the minimum aggregate is allowed for the SC/ST candidates.

faqs.question: What is the admission process at HICAS for BA?
faqs.answer: HICAS BA admission forms are out on the institute's official website. Candidates seeking admission to the programme must submit the application form either in online or offline mode. Given below is theHindusthan College of Arts and Science BA admission process:STEP 1:Visit the college office or fill out the application online on HICAS website. In the application form, candidates must provide personal, guardian and, academic details. The final step of the application process is to pay the HICAS B

faqs.question: Is BSc available at Hindusthan College of Arts and Science?
faqs.answer: Yes, BSc course is available at Hindusthan College of Arts and Science. The university offers BSc courses at the UG level. Candidate must meet the eligibility criteria to enrol for BSc course admission set by the college. Aspirants must pass Class 12 . Hindusthan College of Arts and Science's admission process is merit-based.

courses_data.description: Hindustan College of Arts & Science MBA admission is completely entrance-based. Students are admitted based on a validTANCETscore. Along with that, candidates must also fulfil the minimum eligibility criteria, i.e., to pass graduation with minimum 50% aggregate. faqs.question: How to get admission to MBA at Hindusthan College of Arts and Science?
faqs.answer: To get admission to MBA at Hindusthan College of Arts and Science, candidates must pass graduation with minimum 50% aggrgegate from a recognised board. As the college is affiliated with Bharathiar University, candidates must qualify TANCET with a valid score (TANCET/ CET/ MAT for Management Quota). The selected candidates will be notified through merit list released on the official notice board of the college. Further, candidates must pay a certain amount of fee to confirm their seats.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria of MBA programme for admission at Hindustan College of Arts and Science?
faqs.answer: To be eligible for MBA admission, candidates must have a Bachelor's degree with a minimum 50% aggregate.

Earlier, the highest package offered during HICAS placements 2022 stood at INR 8.2 LPA . Further, IT sector emerged as the top recruiting sector that placed 45% of the total students during Hindusthan College of Arts and Science placements 2022.

faqs.question: What are the career options after BCom from HICAS?
faqs.answer: After pursuing BCom from HICAS, students can opt for various career paths as the course's purpose is to offer students a broad variety of managerial competence in subjects like accounting, finance, administration, and taxation. hostel_campus.college_name: Hindusthan College of Arts and Science Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description: The Hostels are situated within the campus of Hindusthan College of Arts & Science.There are separate hostel facilities for boys and girl's. No of Students in Boy's Hotel is 1000 and Girls's hostel is 800.They are provided with Vegetarian and Non Vegetarian food. There is a central canteen and six cafeteria inside the college premises.

library.description: The college central library functions in a networked environment managed by a library management system to support its various operations and services. The library has a huge collection of books and subscriptions to National and International Journals. The College has membership and subscription to online resources like Inflibnet, Delnet, National Digital Library and Swayam Prabha. The library has an audio visual facility, photocopying facility, air conditioned conference hall and a digital library for enriching the learning environment in the campus.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Basketball Court, Cricket Ground, Football Ground, Tennis Court, Volleyball

reviews.review_heading: Great place for education and enjoyment.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, labs, library, and classrooms are awesome with great facilities and also with many advanced software programs used in this course. Hostel food is not really always good but canteen food is good. It is a college that supports much in extra-curricular activities like sports and cultural events.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it is the best college for the MBA course.
reviews.review_text: The college offered digital learning, projector-based learning, a digital library, Wi-Fi in the library, and charging ports. Although there is no hostel, the food served in the restaurant is always fresh and interesting. Additionally, there is a medical aid box and a medical room. The bathroom is clean and hygienic. The college also has special facilities for athletics and sports.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college, etc.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure at our college is good, with good facilities. There are many departments available in our college. The quality of the facilities in our hostel, the quality of food available in the mess and canteen, and medical facilities are good enough.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Hindusthan College of Arts and Science [HICAS]
reviews.review_text: 89% of the marks were placed in my course. A minimum of 10,000 to 200,000 was offered in my course. L&T company and Infosys company offer placements to my college. 50% of people got internships from my course in Infosys. Jobs are available in IT companies and trading companies.

reviews.review_heading: Strong foundation, practical skills, bright career prospects, and so many events.
reviews.review_text: Well, the labs and classrooms were not so good at the same time. The labs were average and the system was okay. Few of the systems may not be in working condition. The Wi-Fi connection was also average, not good. There were a lot of canteens available in this college. The price range was also valued for the product. The food was good but hostel food was the worst. This college had own hospital with the same name as the college so don't worry about medical facilities. In sports, they give importa...

reviews.review_heading: My college has no limits.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is pretty good and it is a very old college. With a good reputation and classrooms are very hi-fi and have a good Wi-Fi network. It has a hi-tech library. Food in the mess and canteen is good. It has a mobile hospital in our college. In our college, students have secured many medals and shields in various sports competitions.

reviews.review_heading: It's worth the money. You should give it a try.
reviews.review_text: There are numerous labs, and separate hostels for men and women, with options like normal, deluxe, semi-deluxe, super deluxe, and ultra-deluxe. There are more than 15 canteens and a large auditorium.

reviews.review_heading: It is a tech-driven campus with strong placements and vibrant student life.
reviews.review_text: The department offers well-equipped labs, high-speed Wi-Fi, smart classrooms and a central library with vast academic resources. The hostel has clean rooms, decent food in the mess and canteen, 24x7 medical support and good sports facilities including indoor and outdoor games.

reviews.review_heading: Why it has the best academics and faculty?
reviews.review_text: We have Wi-Fi and separate labs for fabric design, drafting, stitching, and pattern making. The labs have all the necessary equipment for our use. Classrooms are smart classrooms. The college has a very accessible library as well. Hostel facilities were good and secure, and there is a hospital clinic inside, so there is no need to fear.

reviews.review_heading: I am very satisfied with the college. The infrastructure is great.
reviews.review_text: Facilities like free Wi-Fi, air-conditioned labs, air-conditioned classrooms, and a library with all essential books are provided. Hostels are facilitated with hot water both for bathing and drinking. Rooms are provided with cots, chairs, and study desks. The mess food menu is not very great. The food quality is low but adjustable. Hindustan Hospital is nearby and the only medicine fee is for students with college ID. There is a basketball court, badminton court, and cricket ground.

reviews.review_heading: Life at HICAS is a blissful moment in my career.
reviews.review_text: Our MAAC dept offers many facilities unlike other departments, like air-conditioned classrooms, and computer labs that are open until 7 pm. College Wi-Fi is good too, and many necessary books are available at the library, and some fun novels like Harry Potter are available too. You may use your ID card to enter the library. Hostels have facilities like hot drinking water, and hot water in the morning for bathing. Food quality is not bad. There would be canteens everywhere, and a ground near the ...

reviews.review_heading: Overall best College for MBA Course.
reviews.review_text: The facilities are the best. The library has a large collection of books on various subjects and also offers free Wi-Fi. Wi-Fi connections are also provided at some other locations. Many eateries are present on campus. There is also a hospital within the campus. We have 5 grounds, a sports complex, and a courtyard inside most of the hostels where the students also play football, cricket, hockey, and other sports.

reviews.review_heading: Good college for those who want to enjoy without worrying about career.
reviews.review_text: In terms of facilities and infrastructure, it is good. Not very worse. Perhaps in a few classrooms we will experience some minor issues. UG students will get to learn through smart classes with projectors. Most of the time, that is frequently available for PG students. Hostel food is not likable.

reviews.review_heading: Overall best College for M.Com. In Computer Application Course.
reviews.review_text: The products and services offered at our college are extensive. Classrooms are equipped with air conditioning and air conditioning. Our campus has shared free Wi-Fi. The library is spacious with many books. The hotel is very clean. Food and care are good. Restaurants and medical facilities have been built there. There are sporting and cultural activities.

reviews.review_heading: Overall best College for MBA Course.
reviews.review_text: Football and cricket fields are available at our university, along with badminton and basketball facilities. Both the science and art libraries on campus include a large collection of books and journals, but they are not digital. There is Wi-Fi on campus, which gives users access to premium journals. The library didn't have some books.

individual_reviews.title: Satisfied with our faculty.

content.Placements: Above 90% of students got placements in my college. The highest package is 4.5 LPA. The lowest package is 1 LPA. Roles are pharmacist, clinical pharmacist, drug inspector, etc.

We have a huge ground for playing badminton, throwball, cricket, etc.

review_content.Placements: This is an MBBS college, so I don't think there will be any placements happening here. If you consider an internship as a placement, then there will be an internship for a year at the end of the course after studying for 4.5 years. The hostel isn't that bad, but if you are thinking that you will get rooms like those in hotels, then you are living in a very bad delusion. Hostel rooms are spacious enough for 2. review_content.Placements: It is an MBBS degree so there are no placements given to students. After MBBS, every doctor can practice either in their clinic or a private hospital or can even apply for government jobs. In private hospitals, MBBS doctor receives a minimum salary of Rs.50,000 per month, and the maximum salary offered is Rs.100000 per month. In government jobs, the average salary package offered ranges between 1 LPA - 2 LPA. After MBBS, you can give NEET PG and enroll for a degree of MS or MD, and after specialisation, doctors are highly paid. Even after post-graduation, you can do DM i.e., super specialisation. The average salary package offered is 32 LPA. Top roles in MBBS are offered in clinical branches.

review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is right now under construction, as it is newly opened. Currently there are three lecture theaters in college and one lecture theater in hospital. reviews_list.review_title: Things that can help you decide if you should take admission to this college or not are mentioned.

review_content.Placements: More than 50% of students get placed here, but you have to do it on your own. College management will surely help you. review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our classrooms is very good. The audio-visual system is available in every classroom for better understanding. Laboratories are well-developed. overview_faqs.question: Is Paramedical College, Durgapur a good college/Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: Paramedical College, Durgapur is a reputed institute for B.Sc., BPT, BHM, BOPTM, BMLT. Students can opt these programs to pursue their career in Science, Medicine & Health Sciences, Hospitality & Travel. Institute has trained & experienced faculty who deliver these programs. Paramedical College, Durgapur has a review rating of 4.1 on the basis of reviews by students. In addition to this, it has been rated 4.2 on campuslife, 4.2 on placements, 4.4 on faculty and 3.8 on Infrastructure.

overview_faqs.answer: The fee bracket for programs offerred by the Paramedical College, Durgapur is approximately INR 146000 - INR 516000.

overview_faqs.question: Is it worth to consider Paramedical College, Durgapur as a good Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: Paramedical College, Durgapur is a renowned institution offering B.Sc, BPT, BHM, BOPTM, BMLT. Students can choose these courses to embark on their careers in the field of Science, Medicine & Health Sciences, Hospitality & Travel. The institute is staffed with highly skilled and experienced faculty members dedicated to delivering these programs. Paramedical College, Durgapur boasts an impressive review rating of 4.08 based on student feedback at Shiksha. Additionally, it has received a rating of 4.18 for Campus Life, 4.21 for Placements, 4.43 for Faculty, and 3.8 for Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: Paramedical College, Durgapur Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor in Medical Laboratory Technology - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Best paramedical college in Durgapur.

content.Placements: Minimum 20% of students get placement. The highest package in 2023 is 8 crores. The total course fee is 2 lakhs and 67 thousand rupees. Per year, we paid 60 thousand rupees. Lab fee is 250 per semester and sports and library fee is 3000 per year. Very sincere and good professors.
content.Infrastructure: Faculty members are very good in teaching. All types of languages are available (Hindi, English, or Bengali). There are 2 labs with many machines and all machines are in good working condition. Wi-Fi is available 24/7. All facilities have MBBS graduates. The canteen is very good at cheap prices. Sports and games are done per year at the end of the year.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor in Medical Laboratory Technology - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: All about Paramedical College, Durgapur.

content.Placements: Paramedical College, Durgapur, is a well-known paramedical institute in West Bengal. If talking about placement the college sometimes provide it and sometimes not. I am pursuing a B.Sc. in MLT, which is a course based on laboratory technology. Most seniors get placed on their own skills; a few get placed by campusing. Those companies are Redcliff Labs, Lal Path Labs, and Healthword Hospital.
content.Infrastructure: If it comes to infrastructure, that is good enough. There is Wi-Fi available 24/7 in classrooms. And labs are available on every subject, like our Biochemistry Lab, Pathology Lab, and Microbiology Lab. Girls hostels are a heaven-like place in our college; cleanliness is everywhere, but you have to pay a hefty amount—seven thousand to eight thousand per month. The canteen, or you can say mess, provides three meals a day.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor in Medical Laboratory Technology - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Things that can help you decide if you should take admission to this college or not are mentioned.

content.Placements: More than 50% of students get placed here, but you have to do it on your own. College management will surely help you. Lal path Labs and many labs, whether they are in the health world or Mission Hospital, recruit BMLT professionals more often. Blood bank or pathology technologies are the positions.
content.Infrastructure: Hostels are well cleaned, and rooms are three- or four-bed, with an attached bathroom or common bathroom. The college lab and classrooms are Wi-Fi-enabled. College holds a sports day and other fests like the yearly fest,  etc. Our college has its own ambulance for medical emergencies.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor in Medical Laboratory Technology - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Our college is very good.

content.Placements: Almost 80% of students got placed from our college in different private medical colleges and hospitals like Apollo Hospital, IQ City Medical College and Hospital, Gouri Devi Medical College, The Mission Hospital, Serum, Dr. Lal Path Labs, etc. The salary package offered is 1.8 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our classrooms is very good. The audio-visual system is available in every classroom for better understanding. Laboratories are well-developed. The library is very good, and all course-related books are available. Our college provides a separate hostel for boys and girls. Our college provides outdoor sports facilities.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor in Medical Laboratory Technology - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Review of Paramedical College, Durgapur.

content.Placements: Around 100% of students got placed in this course. The highest salary package offered is 3 LPA. The lowest salary package offered is 1.5 LPA. The government and non-government companies visit our college for recruitment. Many students got internships in this course.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure are very good. Free Wi-Fi is available on campus. Classrooms are fully modified and projectors are also available in classrooms. The library is highly modified and all kinds of course-related books are available. A digital library is also provided in this college.

admission_overview.college_name: Paramedical College, Durgapur Admission 2025: Fees, Courses, Eligibility and Selection

paragraphs: Paramedical College, Durgapur admissionis through qualifying exam scores of the candidates. The institute offers courses at UG level in streams includingMedicine and Health Sciences, Hospitality and Travel and Science.Paramedical College, Durgapuradmission is granted based on performance of the aspirants in exams, such asJENPAS UG, WBCHSE, and CBSE 12th. Candidates must register online on the institute’s website. For the offline availability of the application form, students must check with the college admission department.
Candidates have to pay a total tuition fee ofINR 1,46,000 - 5,16,000for UG level. Besides tuition fee, students also need to pay caution deposit, exam fee, hostel fee, etc.
Typically, the duration of the UG level courses ranges between 54 months - 4 years.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best paramedical college in West Bengal.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are good in this college. It provides an aqua guard, clean washrooms, and laboratories. All kinds of medical kits and machines are available. The library is fully modified and several books are available. The food quality is average. The canteen is also clean. Medical facilities are provided. The sports ground is also available on premises.

reviews.review_heading: College is very good for degrees for a good job.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is always available in this college and it is for all the students and teachers. Labs are clean and well maintained. Also, the classrooms are always cleaned. Library has all the books you may require for knowledge. Everything is available in this college every year.

reviews.review_heading: This is a very good college for paramedical students.
reviews.review_text: The Wi-Fi, labs and the material are up to date. Classrooms are very good as you can feel the study vibe in them. Library has good collection of books. In January, our college organizes sports activities. Our warden is good. We do not feel that we are far from home, she never makes us feel other than that.

reviews.review_heading: I'm absolutely satisfied with the college.
reviews.review_text: Our college offers free Laboratory, Library and its classrooms are very good. Our college offers free Wi-Fi. Boy's hostel is good. There is a senior assistant who takes care of our, that is why our hostel and also our college is ragging free. Girls' hostel is the same. There are 2 separate hostels for girls. They both are ragging free.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Paramedical College, Durgapur.
reviews.review_text: Our infrastructure is good and facilities are very cooperative. Classrooms have projector facilities, labs are fully equipped and library has digital software facilities. Some of our faculty members were very helpful and cooperative. They treated us like our elder brothers, but the food quality was below average. Sports and games were available for all, mainly outdoor games.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best paramedical college in west Bengal.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is free in our college but does not connect to the phone. We have a full air-conditioned classroom with a projector and speaker. The library is good. The hostel is good and good food is provided in the hostel. All time canteen is open and all types of food are available. All types of games are played in our college.

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely dissatisfied with faculty and good placements.
reviews.review_text: College provides free Wi-Fi but is not connected. Labs are clean and have a microscope, autoclave, centrifuge, Microtome, and incubator in average conditions. Classrooms are clean with a projector and air-conditioners. Library has a lot of books, so no need to buy any books from outside. The quality of food is average. A playground is available.

reviews.review_heading: Our college gives good experience.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is not available in the hostel. Labs and classrooms are well maintained with cleanliness. Hostels for girls and boys are inside the college campus. There is a canteen to have food. College canteen provides breakfast, lunch, and dinner for hostelers.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Paramedical College, Durgapur by a student of the same college.
reviews.review_text: There has labs, libraries and classrooms. You can study with a projector in the classroom. You can practice your study skill in labs And You can study your syllabus or other books in the library. There is no wi-fi connection for students. The hostel is good but their food is bad.

reviews.review_heading: Review of our Paramedical College, Durgapur.
reviews.review_text: In our college, all platforms like classrooms and various department labs are pretty good and spacious. All are in comfort. Labs are well-equipped with instrument and properly sanitized. Wi-Fi facility is available but students need a password to use which can be provided by teachers. The medical and sports facilities are pretty good. The canteen system is also good.
